Shock Module (Commercial).name: Shock Module (Commercial)
Shock Module (Commercial).description: This circuit safely courses electricity through your weapon. It deals an extra 1d6 electricity damage. On a critical hit, electricity arcs out to deal an equal amount of electricity damage to up to two other creatures of your choice within 10 feet of the target.

Artificial Immortalizer.name: Artificial Immortalizer
Artificial Immortalizer.description:
This extra organ assimilates with and enhances your circulatory and immune systems. When you succeed at a Fortitude save against an ongoing disease or poison, you recover completely, regardless of its current stage. When you get this augmentation, you either increase your Constitution modifier by 1 or increase it to +4, whichever would give you a higher value.

Activate—Life Buffer 1 (manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Effect You gain 50 temporary Hit Points, which last for 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.68zoB7dwKUcmEO1R]{Effect: Artificial Immortalizer}

Graviton Crystal (Tactical).name: Graviton Crystal (Tactical)
Graviton Crystal (Tactical).description:
A graviton crystal increases the forces of gravity around your solar manifestations, accelerating its impact and possibly trapping foes within its gravity field. While graviton attuned, your solar weapon or solar flare deals an extra @Damage[1d6[untyped]] damage of your solar weapon's or flare's damage type. On a critical hit while you're graviton attuned, the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:31] save or be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 2 rounds.

Additionally, when you hit an immobilized or suppressed creature with your solar weapon or solar flare, the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:31] save or be knocked prone.

Uniclamp.name: Uniclamp
Uniclamp.description: This is the ultimate all-purpose accessory item for holding everything from a fire extinguisher or flashlight to a musical instrument or comm unit. You can securely attach a single piece of tech gear of up to 1 Bulk to a uniclamp when you install the upgrade. You can activate the attached item using the same number of hands you use to wield your weapon while still wielding your weapon. The uniclamp can be properly configured to handle only non-magical tech gear and doesn't function with weapons or shields. The GM might determine that some items don't fit on certain weapons.

Laser Rifle.name: Laser Rifle
Laser Rifle.description:
Upgrades: 1

These dependable, mass-produced rifles shoot concentrated beams of energy out of square-shaped barrels. The universal standard Pact Worlds model is highly modifiable and designed to function with a variety of accessories and upgrades, with wielders adapting the laser rifle to their preferences and even kit-bashing it into a nearly unrecognizable weapon.

Flash Grenade (Tactical).name: Flash Grenade (Tactical)
Flash Grenade (Tactical).description:
Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical dazzled for 2 rounds

A flash grenade unleashes a blast of bright light that requires creatures in a @Template[burst|distance:10] to attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:class] save. On a failure, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round.

Filtered Rebreather (Commercial).name: Filtered Rebreather (Commercial)
Filtered Rebreather (Commercial).description: This armor upgrade supplements your armor's environmental protections and filters out common contaminants, including protection from most toxic atmospheres.

Maneuvering Unit (Advanced).name: Maneuvering Unit (Advanced)
Maneuvering Unit (Advanced).description:
Internal stabilizers and jets synchronize your movements in zero gravity. You aren't @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} or clumsy while @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.z1ucw4CLwLqHoAp3]{Untethered}.

Activate—Thrust 1 (move)

Requirements You're in a zero-g environment

Effect You move 15 feet in any direction you choose. You begin to float in that direction.

Sniper's Scope (Commercial).name: Sniper's Scope (Commercial)
Sniper's Scope (Commercial).description:
A telescopic sighting attachment helps view distant targets.

Activate—Adjust Sight 1 (manipulate)

Effect Increase the range increment of the weapon the scope is attached to by 10 feet. If the weapon has a base range increment of 50 feet or more, increase the range of the weapon by 20 feet instead. This lasts until the beginning of your next turn or until you're no longer wielding the weapon this scope is attached to, whichever comes first. This does not increase the size of area attacks.

Dermal Plating (Superior).name: Dermal Plating (Superior)
Dermal Plating (Superior).description: Hardened plates protect your skin and help you deflect physical blows. A limb with dermal plating functions as a shield. You can Raise a Shield with your limb, giving you a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of your next turn, but it doesn't require a hand to use. You can use the Shield Block reaction with your limb. Dermal plating has Hardness 20. After you use Shield Block, your dermal plating becomes damaged and can't be used for 24 hours as the nanites repair the durable plates.

Scattergun.name: Scattergun
Scattergun.description:
Upgrades: 1

A scattergun is a long-barreled firearm that fires numerous spherical projectiles to hit multiple targets.

Auto-CPR Unit.name: Auto-CPR Unit
Auto-CPR Unit.description: This device monitors your vital signs and automatically administers aid. When you have the dying condition while wearing this armor, the DC of your recovery checks is equal to 8 + your dying value (instead of 10 + your dying value).

Vertebralis Thorn.name: Vertebralis Thorn
Vertebralis Thorn.description:
Upgrades 1

The vertebralis thorn is a weapon forged in the Corpse Fleet armory, repurposed from the spinal columns of slain enemies and fitted with specialized fiber-optic cables. Corpse Fleet officers favor this weapon, primarily because a ceremonial version is presented to them after their first major conquest, generally created from the spine of a creature they personally killed.

Bipod (Tactical).name: Bipod (Tactical)
Bipod (Tactical).description:
A bipod can be attached to powerful weapons—those with the kickback trait—to allow wielders with lower Strength to use them at the cost of mobility. You can set up the bipod with a single Interact action using one appendage, setting the bipod in your square. When using a bipod, you don't take the –2 penalty for firing a kickback weapon, even if your Strength isn't high enough to avoid the penalty.

You can Interact as a free action to retrieve the bipod before you can move the weapon to a different position. Deploying or retrieving a bipod with an Interact action doesn't automatically make you observed like an Interact action normally would, so long as you don't set up or remove the bipod when it's in a spot where creatures can see it.

Force Field (Paragon).name: Force Field (Paragon)
Force Field (Paragon).description:
Force fields absorb damage. A force field's Hit Points are based on its version. While your force field is active, any physical or energy damage you would take is applied to the force field's Hit Points first before being applied to your Hit Points (including temporary Hit Points). If you have a shield raised, your force field and shield both take damage. If damage from an attack or effect reduces the force field to 0 Hit Points, you take any excess damage, the force field deactivates, and it can't be activated again for 10 minutes. Force fields replenish the indicated number of Hit Points each round at the beginning of your turn while they're active.

If your force field is tactical or better, it also protects you from deadly blows. Each time you're critically hit while your force field is active, attempt a flat check against the listed DC. On a success, it becomes a normal hit.

The force field has 42 Hit Points and replenishes 8 Hit Points on your turn, and @Check[flat|dc:15].

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.7CtHz1DQcMXLafOS]{Effect: Force Field 42}

Activate—Raise Force Field 1 (manipulate)

Frequency three times per day

Effect Your force field becomes active. It remains active for 1 minute or until it's reduced to 0 Hit Points.

Acid Dart Rifle.name: Acid Dart Rifle
Acid Dart Rifle.description:
Upgrades: 1

This rifle uses compressed air to shoot tiny, chambered darts loaded with components for a highly corrosive compound that remains separated until launched, allowing for nearly unlimited shelf life with minimal risk of accidental exposure.

Force Field (Superior).name: Force Field (Superior)
Force Field (Superior).description:
Force fields absorb damage. A force field's Hit Points are based on its version. While your force field is active, any physical or energy damage you would take is applied to the force field's Hit Points first before being applied to your Hit Points (including temporary Hit Points). If you have a shield raised, your force field and shield both take damage. If damage from an attack or effect reduces the force field to 0 Hit Points, you take any excess damage, the force field deactivates, and it can't be activated again for 10 minutes. Force fields replenish the indicated number of Hit Points each round at the beginning of your turn while they're active.

If your force field is tactical or better, it also protects you from deadly blows. Each time you're critically hit while your force field is active, attempt a flat check against the listed DC. On a success, it becomes a normal hit.

The force field has 26 Hit Points and replenishes 5 Hit Points on your turn, and @Check[flat|dc:18].

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.7CtHz1DQcMXLafOS]{Effect: Force Field 26}

Activate—Raise Force Field 1 (manipulate)

Frequency three times per day

Effect Your force field becomes active. It remains active for 1 minute or until it's reduced to 0 Hit Points.

Singing Spear.name: Singing Spear
Singing Spear.description:
Upgrades: 1

Classically shaped like an oversized musical note, this spear intones melodious pitches when it strikes, creating a new song with each battle.

Quicklock.name: Quicklock
Quicklock.description: A quicklock weapon has multiple tracking devices and additional computer processors to increase the rapidity of its built-in targeting systems, allowing its wielder to strike rapidly. While wielding a quicklock weapon, you gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} condition, but you can use the additional action granted only to make a Strike with the weapon.

Seeker Rifle.name: Seeker Rifle
Seeker Rifle.description:
Upgrades: 1

This single-shot sniper rifle is one of the most popular weapons in the Vast thanks to its stability and reliability with minimal upkeep.

Invisibility Spell Amp.name: Invisibility Spell Amp
Invisibility Spell Amp.description:
Known on most worlds as "spell amps," spell ampoules are ready-to-use magic injections that confer the benefits of a spell of the specified rank.

Activate—Inject 1 (manipulate)

Effect 2nd-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility} spell

Datajack (Commercial).name: Datajack (Commercial)
Datajack (Commercial).description: This cybernetic is a programmable data port installed into your body, allowing you to access computers and digital storage devices. Any handheld computer can connect to the port, while larger systems typically require an adapter cable. You don't need an interface to access the system, as it connects directly to your nervous system via the datajack. You must still attempt any skill checks associated with operating the device, such as Computers to access a system. Some closed systems don't allow direct data access at all.

Fireburst Chamber.name: Fireburst Chamber
Fireburst Chamber.description:
A fireburst chamber allows you to direct the detonation of a grenade inside of a grenade launcher or an undermounted grenade launcher.

Activate—Fireburst Mode 1 (manipulate)

Effect The grenade launcher or the undermounted grenade launcher gains the area (cone) trait with a range of 15 feet and uses the properties of the grenade it fires instead of using its normal range. You can end this effect with an Interact action.

Fire Extinguisher (Tactical).name: Fire Extinguisher (Tactical)
Fire Extinguisher (Tactical).description: A fire extinguishes sprays foam in a @Template[type:cone|distance:15], automatically putting out non-magical fires and attempting to counteract any magical fire effects at 4th rank with a [[/r 1d20+14 #Counteract]]{+14} counteract modifier. A fire extinguisher expends one chem each time it's used and uses a chem tank up to tactical grade.

Undermounted Grenade Launcher (Superior).name: Undermounted Grenade Launcher (Superior)
Undermounted Grenade Launcher (Superior).description:
This bracket-mounted grenade launcher is most often advertised for use with fragmentation grenades, but can efficiently deploy utility ordinances, such as smoke grenades and flashbangs. Unlike a dedicated grenade launcher, it takes 10 minutes to load an undermounted grenade launcher, reassembling the grenade into ammunition by mounting it on a specialized reusable firing cap. Once a grenade has been loaded, it can only be safely removed by disassembling the entire grenade, destroying it in the process.

This grenade launcher has a range of 50 feet and the tracking +3 trait.

Activate—Launch 1 (attack)

Effect You launch the loaded grenade.

Flamethrower.name: Flamethrower
Flamethrower.description:
Upgrades: 1

This bulky, rifle-shaped weapon spews flames using a tank of highly combustible, pressurized chemicals housed in its stock.

Filtered Rebreather (Superior).name: Filtered Rebreather (Superior)
Filtered Rebreather (Superior).description:
This armor upgrade supplements your armor's environmental protections and filters out common contaminants, including protection from most toxic atmospheres.

You gain a +3 status bonus to Fortitude saves against inhaled effects.

Cellular Stimulant Spell Amp.name: Cellular Stimulant Spell Amp
Cellular Stimulant Spell Amp.description:
Known on most worlds as "spell amps," spell ampoules are ready-to-use magic injections that confer the benefits of a spell of the specified rank.

Activate—Inject 1 (manipulate)

Effect 1st-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.QiW8VNdBf0SFUq69]{Cellular Stimulant} spell (DC 15)

Dragon Gland (Tactical).name: Dragon Gland (Tactical)
Dragon Gland (Tactical).description:
With cutting edge surgery, you're implanted with an magical gland modified to function for a creature of your ancestry at the back of your throat. Choose your breath weapon's damage type when the organ is biocrafted from the following list: acid, cold, electricity, fire, or sonic. You gain the following activation.

Activate—Exhale 1 (manipulate)

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Effect Each creature in a @Template[type:cone|distance:15] takes @Damage[(2d6)[untyped]] damage with a @Check[reflex|dc:16|basic] save. The damage depends on the augmentation's version.

Assassin Rifle.name: Assassin Rifle
Assassin Rifle.description:
Upgrades: 1

This sniper rifle breaks down into small parts, allowing its wielder to smuggle the weapon without attracting attention. Most assassin rifles are equipped with powerful scopes and digital sights.

Cloaking Skin (Tactical).name: Cloaking Skin (Tactical)
Cloaking Skin (Tactical).description:
Many of your pores are replaced with magically regulated and directed holographic projectors that synchronize when activated to automatically match your surroundings, rendering you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}.

Activate—Cloak 1 (concentrate)

Frequency three times per day

Effect You gain the effects of 2nd-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility} for 1 minute or until you spend an action, which has the concentrate trait, to deactivate it.

Null Space Chamber (Advanced).name: Null Space Chamber (Advanced)
Null Space Chamber (Advanced).description:
This sleek black device attaches to a backpack, purse, or key ring. When you press a button on the side of the device, it creates a circular portal to an extradimensional pocket space. The space's capacity depends on the device's type.

You can Interact with the null space chamber to stow items in it or remove them. The null space chamber can be opened and closed only from the outside. When a null space chamber is opened in an atmosphere with air, it fills with 10 minutes' worth of air for every Bulk left in its capacity. An item inside the null space chamber provides no benefits unless it's retrieved first. Connecting the null space chamber to a computer causes it to display a readout of all items stored within it.

Capacity 100 Bulk

Card Slinger.name: Card Slinger
Card Slinger.description:
Upgrade: 1

This ceramic weapon sharpens and fires playing cards, such as those from an infinity deck. Their folding design and innocuous ammunition make it ideal for infiltrating secure locations, especially casinos. While the weapon often relies on lucky hits, in the hands of a gambler familiar with card trajectory, it can become deadly.

Cloaking Device (Commercial).name: Cloaking Device (Commercial)
Cloaking Device (Commercial).description:
This projector bends light around your body.

Activate—Bend Light 1 (manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Effect You become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} for 1 minute, gaining the effects of a 2nd-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility} spell.

Diva's Microphone (Advanced).name: Diva's Microphone (Advanced)
Diva's Microphone (Advanced).description:
This ostentatious crystal microphone is embellished with glimmering jewels and delicate lights that pulse in time to music. It functions as both a microphone and speaker, amplifying your voice loud enough for you to be heard clearly by all listeners up to 500 feet away, even if other ambient noise would otherwise block the sound. This doesn't increase the range or area of other auditory or linguistic effects, and physical barriers such as walls still block or muffle your voice as normal.

The diva's microphone grants a +3 item bonus to Performance checks attempted with it.

Activate—Grand Finale 2 (auditory)

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Effect Your song reaches an eardrum-bursting climax as you cast a 8th-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.QpP30fcEl4NGjHwo]{Sonic Scream} originating from your space (DC 38).

Medpatch (Advanced).name: Medpatch (Advanced)
Medpatch (Advanced).description:
Activate 1 (manipulate)

Medpatches accelerate the body's natural healing. You regain @Damage[(5d6+12)[healing]] Hit Points and gain a +2 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{Effect: Medpatch}

Emergency Beacon.name: Emergency Beacon
Emergency Beacon.description: This item requires a battery to be installed for it to operate. When activated, this small, pod-shaped device transmits its location and emits a flash of bright red light once per round, consuming 1 charge per day. Any device capable of receiving signals can pick up a signal from an emergency beacon, which can then be traced with a successful @Check[computers|dc:15] or @Check[survival|dc:15] check. An emergency beacon's transmissions have a range of 100 miles over flat terrain, 50 miles in forests or hills, and 25 miles in mountainous terrain or underwater. Alternatively, an emergency beacon can be installed in a starship's or vehicle's communications system. In this case, its range is equal to that of the communications array, and it consumes 1 charge per hour.

Shimmerstone Serum.name: Shimmerstone Serum
Shimmerstone Serum.description:
Activate 1 (manipulate)

A blue tincture distilled from shimmerstone. You gain a +1 item bonus to saving throws against mental effects and a +2 item bonus to checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} for 10 minutes.

Spell Chip (4th-Rank Spell).name: Spell Chip (4th-Rank Spell)
Spell Chip (4th-Rank Spell).description:
Usage installed in computer or comm unit;

These chips can be installed in comm units and other computers to allow the device to cast spells. Each device can have only one spell chip. Casting a spell from a spell chip requires holding the computer or comm unit in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell. The spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack modifier and spell DC. The spell must be of your spellcasting tradition. If the spell has a locus, you must still have that locus to cast the spell from a spell chip. Spell chips can't contain cantrips or rituals. The traits for this item vary based on the spell it contains.

In addition to the charge expended to Cast the Spell, the delicate components that make up the core lattice of a spell chip can be destroyed if used in quick succession. Attempting to use a spell chip more than once per day requires overclocking it. Cast the Spell again, then roll a @Check[flat|dc:10]. On a success, the spell chip is broken. On a failure, the spell chip is destroyed. If anyone tries to overclock a spell chip that's already been overclocked that day, the spell chip is automatically destroyed (even if it's been repaired) and no spell is cast.

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day, plus overclock

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated rank.

Smoke Grenade (Tactical).name: Smoke Grenade (Tactical)
Smoke Grenade (Tactical).description:
Activate 1 Area Fire

This grenade unleashes a cloud of concealing smoke in a @Template[burst|distance:10]. Creatures within the area have the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} condition, and all other creatures are concealed to them. The smoke lasts for 1 minute or until dissipated by a strong wind or similar effect.

Ultralight Wings (Commercial).name: Ultralight Wings (Commercial)
Ultralight Wings (Commercial).description: Foldable wings are attached to your shoulder blades or a similar location on your body that allows them to lift your weight and assist your flying movements. You can deploy the wings with an Interact action, but you can't deploy or use them while you're wearing more than light armor. While the wings are deployed and you're not encumbered, you gain a fly Speed of 20 feet and a +1 item bonus to Acrobatics checks to Maneuver in Flight.

Glamer Projector.name: Glamer Projector
Glamer Projector.description:
Adjustable rings project magical holograms onto your armor, changing its appearance to match your personal style and suit any occasion. Glamer projectors come programmed with preset options, including casual, corporate, and fashion. You can customize your glamer projector using a computer, like the one in your comm unit.

Activate—Glamerize! 1 (manipulate)

Effect You instantly change the appearance of your armor to any set of normal clothes or any other type of light or heavy armor. This upgrade is capable of changing only the appearance of your armor, not yourself or the rest of your equipment. You can copy the look of any type of clothing, but you don't gain any item bonuses provided by special types of clothing, such as luxury fashion attire. Only a creature that's benefiting from truesight or a similar effect can attempt to disbelieve this illusion, opposed by your class DC.

Fear Projector (Tactical).name: Fear Projector (Tactical)
Fear Projector (Tactical).description: This integrated hologram projector makes the wounds caused by the weapon look way worse than they are. When you critically hit with this weapon, the target becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Congealer Incense (Commercial).name: Congealer Incense (Commercial)
Congealer Incense (Commercial).description:
This delicate strand of incense is packaged in a hand-blown glass vial and crafted from petrified wood of centuries-old Eoxian trees, peppered with a tincture of elebrian ashes and enchanted sand from the Deminas Ocean. When exposed to air by breaking the container, the incense bursts into cloying, lavender-scented smoke that sticks to incorporeal creatures and stabilizes their form.

Activate—Break Open 1 (manipulate) Duration 1 minute

Effect Purple smoke billows out from the incense in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:5]. At the start of each round, this emanation increases by 5 feet (to a maximum of 30 feet). The creature who activated the congealer incense can drop it in a space as a free action, or can continue to carry it with them in 1 hand, thus moving the center of the emanation on that creature's turn. Any incorporeal creature who enters this area or begins their turn inside of it must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:19] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success Treat the incorporeal creature's resistances as 4 lower.

Failure As success, but the creature loses all immunity to precision damage and treats its resistances as 8 lower.

Critical Failure As failure, but the creature is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Hacking Toolkit (Tactical).name: Hacking Toolkit (Tactical)
Hacking Toolkit (Tactical).description: A hacking toolkit is required for Computers checks to Hack computers. You can use a hacking toolkit to access a computer without using a user interface, but this requires physical contact with the computer or contact via an infosphere or a similar linked network. A tactical hacking toolkit adds a +1 item bonus to checks made with it.

Hypopen (Ultimate).name: Hypopen (Ultimate)
Hypopen (Ultimate).description:
This tiny cylinder contains specialized nanites that either

  • Remove the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} condition
  • Decrease the value of the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened} condition by 1.
  • Attempt a counteract check against one poison or disease afflicting the target. Use your @Check[medicine] modifier for the counteract modifier and a counteract rank of 7.
  • Attempt a flat check to end persistent poison or bleed damage. As this is particularly effective assistance, the DC of the flat check is reduced from 15 to 10 for this check.
  • Allow you to become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} for 1 minute. You can use the extra action to Step, Stride, or Strike.

  • Grant you fast healing 10 for 1 minute. If you have the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained} condition, decrease its value by 1 instead of gaining fast healing.

    @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.NqP5f6IChp8XNCrJ]{Effect: Hypopen (Quickened or Fast Healing)}

Medpatch (Superior).name: Medpatch (Superior)
Medpatch (Superior).description:
Activate 1 (manipulate)

Medpatches accelerate the body's natural healing. You regain @Damage[(7d6+18)[healing]] Hit Points and gain a +2 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{Effect: Medpatch}

Voice Amplifier.name: Voice Amplifier
Voice Amplifier.description: A voice amplifier greatly increases the volume of your voice. You can switch a voice amplifier on or off by spending an action, which has the concentrate trait. While active, a voice amplifier grants you a +1 item bonus to Intimidation checks and lowers the DCs of Perception checks to hear you speaking by 5.

Force Field (Tactical).name: Force Field (Tactical)
Force Field (Tactical).description:
Force fields absorb damage. A force field's Hit Points are based on its version. While your force field is active, any physical or energy damage you would take is applied to the force field's Hit Points first before being applied to your Hit Points (including temporary Hit Points). If you have a shield raised, your force field and shield both take damage. If damage from an attack or effect reduces the force field to 0 Hit Points, you take any excess damage, the force field deactivates, and it can't be activated again for 10 minutes. Force fields replenish the indicated number of Hit Points each round at the beginning of your turn while they're active.

If your force field is tactical or better, it also protects you from deadly blows. Each time you're critically hit while your force field is active, attempt a flat check against the listed DC. On a success, it becomes a normal hit.

The force field has 14 Hit Points and replenishes 3 Hit Points on your turn, and @Check[flat|dc:20].

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.7CtHz1DQcMXLafOS]{Effect: Force Field 14}

Activate—Raise Force Field 1 (manipulate)

Frequency three times per day

Effect Your force field becomes active. It remains active for 1 minute or until it's reduced to 0 Hit Points.

Pulse Gauntlet.name: Pulse Gauntlet
Pulse Gauntlet.description:
Upgrades: 1

Popularized in underground fighting circles, this heavy-duty nanocarbon glove amplifies and weaponizes sounds made by its wielder, generating a sonic boom strong enough to knock an enemy off their feet.

Lock (Commercial).name: Lock (Commercial)
Lock (Commercial).description: Picking a commercial lock requires two successful [[/act pick-a-lock dc=15]]{DC 15 Thievery} checks.

Boom Pistol.name: Boom Pistol
Boom Pistol.description:
Upgrades: 1

A boom pistol resembles a megaphone with a trigger, emitting sudden bursts of sound capable of shattering bulletproof glass or rupturing organs.

Force Field (Ultimate).name: Force Field (Ultimate)
Force Field (Ultimate).description:
Force fields absorb damage. A force field's Hit Points are based on its version. While your force field is active, any physical or energy damage you would take is applied to the force field's Hit Points first before being applied to your Hit Points (including temporary Hit Points). If you have a shield raised, your force field and shield both take damage. If damage from an attack or effect reduces the force field to 0 Hit Points, you take any excess damage, the force field deactivates, and it can't be activated again for 10 minutes. Force fields replenish the indicated number of Hit Points each round at the beginning of your turn while they're active.

If your force field is tactical or better, it also protects you from deadly blows. Each time you're critically hit while your force field is active, attempt a flat check against the listed DC. On a success, it becomes a normal hit.

The force field has 37 Hit Points and replenishes 7 Hit Points on your turn, and @Check[flat|dc:16].

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.7CtHz1DQcMXLafOS]{Effect: Force Field 37}

Activate—Raise Force Field 1 (manipulate)

Frequency three times per day

Effect Your force field becomes active. It remains active for 1 minute or until it's reduced to 0 Hit Points.

Thermal Capacitor (Tactical).name: Thermal Capacitor (Tactical)
Thermal Capacitor (Tactical).description: This armor upgrade regulates heat, protecting you from extreme temperatures. You're protected from severe cold and mild heat.

Cairn Form Spell Amp (Commercial).name: Cairn Form Spell Amp (Commercial)
Cairn Form Spell Amp (Commercial).description:
Known on most worlds as "spell amps," spell ampoules are ready-to-use magic injections that confer the benefits of a spell of the specified rank.

Activate—Inject 1 (manipulate)

Type commercial cairn form spell amp; Level 7; Price 720 credits

Effect 4th-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.HAaRcHfN4g83eSEC]{Cairn Form} spell

Lock (Superior).name: 究极锁 Lock (Superior)
Lock (Superior).description: Picking a superior lock requires five successful [[/act pick-a-lock dc=30]]{DC 30 Thievery} checks.

Fangblade.name: Fangblade
Fangblade.description:
Upgrades: 1

Durable teeth line the edges of this motorized sword and spin with the force of an industrial chainsaw.

Magboots.name: Magboots
Magboots.description: Magboots can be activated or deactivated with an Interact action. While active, they grant you a +1 item bonus to Athletics checks to Climb metal surfaces as well as a +1 item bonus to your Fortitude or Reflex DC against attempts to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.lOE4yjUnETTdaf2T]{Reposition}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove}, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{Trip} you when you're standing on a metal surface. In areas of zero gravity, while wearing a pair of magboots, you can move your Speed across metal surfaces and don't gain the untethered condition.

Battleglove.name: Battleglove
Battleglove.description:
Upgrades: 1

These durable gloves fit over a wielder's hands (or other appendages) and feature weighted plates or spikes over the knuckles.

Smoke Grenade (Ultimate).name: Smoke Grenade (Ultimate)
Smoke Grenade (Ultimate).description:
Activate 1 Area Fire

This grenade unleashes a cloud of concealing smoke in a @Template[burst|distance:50]. Creatures within the area have the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} condition, and all other creatures are concealed to them. The smoke lasts for 1 minute or until dissipated by a strong wind or similar effect.

Active Camouflage (Commercial).name: Active Camouflage (Commercial)
Active Camouflage (Commercial).description: Hardlight projectors shift the appearance of your armor using shifting colors and patterns that respond to your environment. You gain a +1 item bonus to Stealth checks while wearing the armor.

Degradation Grenade (Tactical).name: Degradation Grenade (Tactical)
Degradation Grenade (Tactical).description:
Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @Damage[1d4[persistent,acid]] damage

Degradation grenades create violent blasts of magic that rip matter into different realities, leaving behind blackened hunks of matter that dissipate into nothingness. When the grenade explodes, it deals 2d8 acid damage in a @Template[burst|distance:10] with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save.

Field Scientist's Toolkit (Tactical).name: Field Scientist's Toolkit (Tactical)
Field Scientist's Toolkit (Tactical).description: A field scientist toolkit contains a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.btcbYUK4UqgQ699i]{Chemalyzer}, microscope, recording tools, and specimen bags. A tactical field scientist toolkit grants a +1 item bonus on @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} checks using Nature or an appropriate Lore skill.

Shobhad Longrifle.name: 绍贝德长步枪 Shobhad Longrifle

Veskarium Imperial Plate.name: Veskarium Imperial Plate
Veskarium Imperial Plate.description:
Upgrades: 1

This heavy armor is made of interlocking metal plates contoured to the wearer's body with a scaled pattern. Tailguards and clawed gloves are standard for this armor.

Carbon Shield.name: Carbon Shield
Carbon Shield.description: This durable yet lightweight defensive plate comes in a variety of shapes and sizes, and it's often customized with LED displays that broadcast personal insignia or an organization's colors and symbols.

Aeon Stone (Life-Giving).name: Aeon Stone (Life-Giving)
Aeon Stone (Life-Giving).description:
Staple items within the Azlanti Star Empire, these gemstones are popular status symbols for adventurers and wealthy collectors. Despite their myriad forms and functions, these stones are purportedly all fragments of crystal tools used by otherworldly entities to build the Universe in ancient times.

When you invest one of these precisely shaped crystals, the stone orbits your head (or another visible part of your anatomy if you don't have a head) instead of being worn on your body. You can stow an aeon stone with an Interact action, and an orbiting stone can be snatched out of the air with a successful @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Dt6B1slsBy8ipJu9]{Disarm} action against you. A stowed or removed stone remains invested, but its effects are @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} until you return it to orbit your head again.

There are various types of aeon stones, each with a different appearance and magical effect. Each aeon stone also gains a resonant power when slotted into specific items, such as weapons with the aeon trait or antique magical devices called wayfinders.

This nacreous, tapered cylinder provides a breath of air when you need it most. You can hold your breath for twice as long, and you gain a +1 item bonus to saves against inhaled poisons. The resonant power allows you to cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.ShwUELLERVMtdjwE]{Life Seal} as a divine innate spell once per day.

Darkvision Visor.name: Darkvision Visor
Darkvision Visor.description: This visor wraps around your visual organs, enhancing your natural senses. You gain darkvision.

Resist Energy Spell Amp (Tactical).name: Resist Energy Spell Amp (Tactical)
Resist Energy Spell Amp (Tactical).description:
Known on most worlds as "spell amps," spell ampoules are ready-to-use magic injections that confer the benefits of a spell of the specified rank.

Activate—Inject 1 (manipulate)

Effect 4th-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Fr58LDSrbndgld9n]{Resist Energy} spell

Smoke Grenade (Commercial).name: Smoke Grenade (Commercial)
Smoke Grenade (Commercial).description:
Activate 1 Area Fire

This grenade unleashes a cloud of concealing smoke in a @Template[burst|distance:5]. Creatures within the area have the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} condition, and all other creatures are concealed to them. The smoke lasts for 1 minute or until dissipated by a strong wind or similar effect.

Archaic Text.name: Archaic Text
Archaic Text.description: This book could be a religious text, a collection of ancient recipes, a romance novel, or vintage mechanical schematics.

Spell Gem (4th-Rank Spell).name: Spell Gem (4th-Rank Spell)
Spell Gem (4th-Rank Spell).description:
These latticed gemstones are suspended in a silicon casing and encoded with the magical script necessary to cast a single, specific spell. Casting a spell from a spell gem requires holding the gem in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell. The spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack modifier and spell DC. The spell must be of your spellcasting tradition. The spell in a spell gem can be cast only once, and the spell gem is destroyed as part of the casting. Spell gems can't contain cantrips or rituals. The traits for this item vary based on the spell it contains.

Activate Cast a Spell

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated rank.

Spell Chip (2nd-Rank Spell).name: Spell Chip (2nd-Rank Spell)
Spell Chip (2nd-Rank Spell).description:
Usage installed in computer or comm unit;

These chips can be installed in comm units and other computers to allow the device to cast spells. Each device can have only one spell chip. Casting a spell from a spell chip requires holding the computer or comm unit in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell. The spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack modifier and spell DC. The spell must be of your spellcasting tradition. If the spell has a locus, you must still have that locus to cast the spell from a spell chip. Spell chips can't contain cantrips or rituals. The traits for this item vary based on the spell it contains.

In addition to the charge expended to Cast the Spell, the delicate components that make up the core lattice of a spell chip can be destroyed if used in quick succession. Attempting to use a spell chip more than once per day requires overclocking it. Cast the Spell again, then roll a @Check[flat|dc:10]. On a success, the spell chip is broken. On a failure, the spell chip is destroyed. If anyone tries to overclock a spell chip that's already been overclocked that day, the spell chip is automatically destroyed (even if it's been repaired) and no spell is cast.

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day, plus overclock

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated rank.

Fire Extinguisher (Advanced).name: Fire Extinguisher (Advanced)
Fire Extinguisher (Advanced).description: A fire extinguishes sprays foam in a @Template[type:cone|distance:15], automatically putting out non-magical fires and attempting to counteract any magical fire effects at 6th rank with a [[/r 1d20+19 #Counteract]]{+19} counteract modifier. A fire extinguisher expends one chem each time it's used and uses a chem tank up to advanced grade.

Cable Line (50 Feet, Tactical).name: Cable Line (50 Feet, Tactical)
Cable Line (50 Feet, Tactical).description: This industrial cable is typically made of high-durability plastic coated in metal. A tactical cable line is coated in adamantine alloy.

Frag Grenade (Superior).name: Frag Grenade (Superior)
Frag Grenade (Superior).description:
Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @Damage[1d6[bleed]]

These fragmentary grenades explode in a cloud of shrapnel and deal 8d8 piercing damage in a @Template[burst|distance:15] with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save.

Spell Gem (9th-Rank Spell).name: Spell Gem (9th-Rank Spell)
Spell Gem (9th-Rank Spell).description:
These latticed gemstones are suspended in a silicon casing and encoded with the magical script necessary to cast a single, specific spell. Casting a spell from a spell gem requires holding the gem in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell. The spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack modifier and spell DC. The spell must be of your spellcasting tradition. The spell in a spell gem can be cast only once, and the spell gem is destroyed as part of the casting. Spell gems can't contain cantrips or rituals. The traits for this item vary based on the spell it contains.

Activate Cast a Spell

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated rank.

Hammer.name: 锤子 Hammer
Hammer.description:
Upgrades: 1

Valued as both a crafting tool and an effective weapon, this hammer uses specially weighted heads and handles to deliver maximum force with each strike.

Wildwise Graft.name: Wildwise Graft
Wildwise Graft.description: This soft purple fungus attaches to your vocal cords and extends fine filaments into portions of your brain. You can ask questions of, receive answers from, and use the Diplomacy skill with animals, plants, and fungi. This communication is rudimentary and elicits basic responses, such as "hungry," "over there," or "frightened."

Thermal Capacitor (Commercial).name: Thermal Capacitor (Commercial)
Thermal Capacitor (Commercial).description: This armor upgrade regulates heat, protecting you from extreme temperatures. You're protected from mild cold and mild heat.

Spell Gem (6th-Rank Spell).name: Spell Gem (6th-Rank Spell)
Spell Gem (6th-Rank Spell).description:
These latticed gemstones are suspended in a silicon casing and encoded with the magical script necessary to cast a single, specific spell. Casting a spell from a spell gem requires holding the gem in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell. The spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack modifier and spell DC. The spell must be of your spellcasting tradition. The spell in a spell gem can be cast only once, and the spell gem is destroyed as part of the casting. Spell gems can't contain cantrips or rituals. The traits for this item vary based on the spell it contains.

Activate Cast a Spell

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated rank.

Marrow Paste (Advanced).name: Marrow Paste (Advanced)
Marrow Paste (Advanced).description: Developed and patented by Eoxian medical conglomerate Nulife, this magenta tincture's metallic odor is reminiscent of fresh blood. When applied to the body of a creature that can benefit from void healing, marrow paste grants fast healing 5 for 1 minute.

Quilted Armor.name: 棉甲 Quilted Armor
Quilted Armor.description:
Upgrades: 1

This armor is made of layered fabrics stitched together and is popular with scavengers. On Akiton, some suits of quilted armor are actually constructed of heirloom blankets and garments repurposed for protection.

Flashlight (Tactical).name: Flashlight (Tactical)
Flashlight (Tactical).description: A flashlight sheds bright light. A tactical flashlight emits its light in a 60-foot radius (and dim light in the next 60 feet) and is equipped with filters, which you can close to block or dim the light. Activating the filters takes an Interact action.

Portable Amp.name: Portable Amp
Portable Amp.description: This small device is typically synced up to an instrument, microphone, or the audio playback on a datapad. It amplifies the audio volume, reducing the DC of Perception checks to hear the audio by 5.

Infinity Deck.name: Infinity Deck
Infinity Deck.description: A replica of an artifact that appeared during the Gap, this deck of playing cards is used to play countless games.

Skull of Yore.name: Skull of Yore
Skull of Yore.description: This yellowing skull gazes back at you with an unreadable rictus smile. When held or worn as an accessory, this magical talisman grants a +1 item bonus to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} checks to identify undead.

Animated Intelligence (Advanced).name: Animated Intelligence (Advanced)
Animated Intelligence (Advanced).description:
Magical circuitry generates a virtual animated intelligence with a customizable personality and no free will. Rarely, a virtual intelligence might eventually evolve into a true artificial intelligence with self-awareness and free will, usually with the help of powerful magic or a miracle.

Activate—Autoattack 2 (concentrate, manipulate)

Effect You Release the weapon and it glides through the air, fighting on its own against the last enemy you attacked, or the nearest enemy to it if your target has been defeated. At the end of your turn each round, the weapon can Fly up to its fly Speed of 60 feet, and then can either Fly again or Strike one creature within its range or reach.

The weapon has a space of 5 feet, but it doesn't block or impede enemies attempting to move though that space. It provides but does not benefit from flanking. The animated intelligence is considered a technological creature for the purpose of effects that can target it. The weapon can't move through an enemy's space. The weapon can't use reactions, and its Fly actions don't trigger reactions.

While it's activated, the animated intelligence Strikes with an attack modifier of +32 plus its item bonus to attack rolls. It uses the weapon's normal damage but has a +0 Strength and Dexterity modifier. The weapon's abilities that automatically trigger on a hit or critical hit still function, but the weapon can't be activated or benefit from any of your abilities while animated.

Each round, when the weapon finishes using its actions, attempt a @Check[flat|dc:4]. On a failure, the activation ends. The weapon falls to the ground and can't Autoattack again for 10 minutes.

Muscle Invigorator.name: Muscle Invigorator
Muscle Invigorator.description:
This augmentation keeps your muscles in peak condition. You gain a +3 item bonus to Athletics checks. When you get this augmentation, you either increase your Strength modifier by 1 or increase it to +4, whichever would give you a higher value.

Activate—Strength of the Colossi 1 (manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Effect You temporarily become as destructive and powerful as a colossus. For 1 hour, your melee Strikes ignore the hardness of all objects and structures not made of adamantine or a harder material.

Null Space Chamber (Tactical).name: Null Space Chamber (Tactical)
Null Space Chamber (Tactical).description:
This sleek black device attaches to a backpack, purse, or key ring. When you press a button on the side of the device, it creates a circular portal to an extradimensional pocket space. The space's capacity depends on the device's type.

You can Interact with the null space chamber to stow items in it or remove them. The null space chamber can be opened and closed only from the outside. When a null space chamber is opened in an atmosphere with air, it fills with 10 minutes' worth of air for every Bulk left in its capacity. An item inside the null space chamber provides no benefits unless it's retrieved first. Connecting the null space chamber to a computer causes it to display a readout of all items stored within it.

Capacity 50 Bulk

+2 Weapon Potency Crystal.name: +2 Weapon Potency Crystal
+2 Weapon Potency Crystal.description: This item crystallizes the focus needed to replicate the actions of a star. Attack rolls with the solar weapon or flare gain a +2 item bonus, and the weapon or flare can benefit from two orbital crystals.

Autodreamer.name: Autodreamer
Autodreamer.description: A microchip embedded into your nervous system activates whenever you sleep, immersing you in constant lucid dreams unless you choose to sleep normally. Once per day when you awaken after getting a full 8 hours of sleep, you count as having spent a day of downtime retraining. Your dreams draw from your own experiences, so you can't use them for retraining that requires an instructor or specialized knowledge.

Dermal Plating (Ultimate).name: Dermal Plating (Ultimate)
Dermal Plating (Ultimate).description: Hardened plates protect your skin and help you deflect physical blows. A limb with dermal plating functions as a shield. You can Raise a Shield with your limb, giving you a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of your next turn, but it doesn't require a hand to use. You can use the Shield Block reaction with your limb. Dermal plating has Hardness 30. After you use Shield Block, your dermal plating becomes damaged and can't be used for 24 hours as the nanites repair the durable plates.

Striking Crystal (Commercial).name: Striking Crystal (Commercial)
Striking Crystal (Commercial).description: This gem contains the condensed matter of a star and increases the weapon damage dice of a solar weapon or flare to two instead of one.

Cognition Accelerator.name: Cognition Accelerator
Cognition Accelerator.description:
A miniature supercomputer augments your brain's ability to process information. You gain a +3 item bonus to checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} with any skill. When you get this augmentation, you either increase your Intelligence modifier by 1 or increase it to +4, whichever would give you a higher value. This gives you additional trained skills and languages, as normal for increasing your Intelligence modifier. You must select skills and languages when the augmentation is first installed, and they can't be changed.

Activate—Access Database 1 (concentrate)

Frequency once per hour

Effect Immediately attempt three checks to Recall Knowledge about related topics, selecting each topic after learning the results of the prior checks. If you would fail one of these checks, you succeed instead.

Medpatch (Commercial).name: Medpatch (Commercial)
Medpatch (Commercial).description:
Activate 1 (manipulate)

Medpatches accelerate the body's natural healing. You regain @Damage[(1d6)[healing]] Hit Points and gain a +1 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{Effect: Medpatch}

Second Skin.name: 着甲如肤 Second Skin
Second Skin.description:
Upgrades: 0

Soft but resilient fabric contours perfectly to the wearer's body, offering basic protection without sacrificing comfort. Second skin is commonly worn underneath casual clothing.

Spell Gem (5th-Rank Spell).name: Spell Gem (5th-Rank Spell)
Spell Gem (5th-Rank Spell).description:
These latticed gemstones are suspended in a silicon casing and encoded with the magical script necessary to cast a single, specific spell. Casting a spell from a spell gem requires holding the gem in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell. The spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack modifier and spell DC. The spell must be of your spellcasting tradition. The spell in a spell gem can be cast only once, and the spell gem is destroyed as part of the casting. Spell gems can't contain cantrips or rituals. The traits for this item vary based on the spell it contains.

Activate Cast a Spell

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated rank.

Frag Grenade (Tactical).name: Frag Grenade (Tactical)
Frag Grenade (Tactical).description:
Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @Damage[1d4[bleed]]

These fragmentary grenades explode in a cloud of shrapnel and deal 2d8 piercing damage in a @Template[burst|distance:10] with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save.

Regenerative Rune Splice.name: Regenerative Rune Splice
Regenerative Rune Splice.description:
Your genes are enchanted with microscopic runes that you can activate to recover from traumatic injury.

Activate—Regenerate 2 (concentrate)

Frequency once per day

Effect You gain the effects of a 4th-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.s6J1Q0e28Gb42epQ]{Genetic Regeneration} spell.

Necrolung (Commercial).name: Necrolung (Commercial)
Necrolung (Commercial).description:
Spongy black webbing radiates from a grayish purple mass of necrotized flesh that pulses when it's exposed to air. Specially grown in vats from waste produced in the necrograft manufacturing process, necrolungs allow living creatures to breathe efficiently and safely on Eox, becoming effectively immune to the toxins in its atmosphere for an additional 24 hours.

Installing a necrolung takes one minute and requires no skill checks. When installed, a necrolung slithers down your throat (or appropriate alien anatomy) and integrates into your respiratory system. Most users notice a harmless pallor and rotting smell while using the tech.

Jetpack (Commercial).name: Jetpack (Commercial)
Jetpack (Commercial).description:
Boosters attached to your armor allow you to fly.

Activate—Fly 1 (manipulate)

Effect You activate a jetpack to gain a fly Speed of 20 feet. This effect lasts for 1 minute or until you Dismiss it. You can use an action to Fly 0 feet to hover in place, but you're @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} while doing so. A jetpack can't lift you if you're encumbered.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.0kP4P73w0PykYkPY]{Effect: Jetpack}

Sunshades (Tactical).name: Sunshades (Tactical)
Sunshades (Tactical).description: Sunshades make everyone look cooler. You gain a +1 item bonus to saves against effects that cause the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} condition while wearing tactical sunshades.

Frost Module (Commercial).name: Frost Module (Commercial)
Frost Module (Commercial).description: This module siphons the heat from the weapon's striking edge and ammunition, powering itself with the excess energy as it chills the air around it. It deals an additional 1d6 cold damage on a successful Strike. On a critical hit, the target is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} until the end of your next turn unless it succeeds at a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:24] save.

Load Lifter (Advanced).name: Load Lifter (Advanced)
Load Lifter (Advanced).description: This series of support braces allow you to carry and lift beyond your normal capacity. You can carry an amount of Bulk equal to 8 plus your Strength modifier without becoming encumbered, and you can hold and carry a total Bulk up to 13 plus your Strength modifier.

Sniper's Scope (Superior).name: Sniper's Scope (Superior)
Sniper's Scope (Superior).description:
A telescopic sighting attachment helps view distant targets.

The scope grants you a +3 item bonus to visual Perception checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} creatures through the scope.

Activate—Adjust Sight 1 (manipulate)

Effect Increase the range increment of the weapon the scope is attached to by 40 feet. If the weapon has a base range increment of 50 feet or more, increase the range of the weapon by 80 feet instead. This lasts until the beginning of your next turn or until you're no longer wielding the weapon this scope is attached to, whichever comes first. This does not increase the size of area attacks.

Microcord Armor.name: Microcord Armor
Microcord Armor.description:
Upgrades: 1

This light armor is woven from ultralight fibers that flex with a wearer's movements but turn hard as steel on impact.

Baton.name: Baton
Baton.description:
Upgrades: 1

This reinforced rod is commonly made from metal alloys and designed to strike and parry incoming blows.

Entropic Destabilizer (Tactical).name: Entropic Destabilizer (Tactical)
Entropic Destabilizer (Tactical).description:
Tendrils of dark energy soar from the unit affixed to this weapon, coating it and its ammunition in a disturbing purple hue. When you hit with the weapon, add 1d4 void damage to the damage dealt. In addition, on a critical hit, the target takes 4d4 persistent void damage; if the target has a shield raised, the shield takes the same amount of persistent damage (its wielder rolls the flat check to see if the persistent damage ends, or the GM rolls if the shield is no longer in someone's possession). Unlike normal void damage, the void damage from an entropic destabilizer damages objects, constructs, and the like by eroding them away.

The void damage dealt by this weapon ignores the target's void resistance or immunity.

Akashic Lens (Tactical).name: Akashic Lens (Tactical)
Akashic Lens (Tactical).description:
Worn as a contact lens, spectacles, or other eyewear, these magically treated lenses project a special data display that uses virtual intelligence and rapid eye tracking to quickly cycle through information until you find what you seek. It grants you a +1 item bonus to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} checks with the skill chosen when you use Database Scan.

Activate—Database Scan 2 (concentrate)

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Effect The lens casts a 4th-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.VynaowCerc7B4yvI]{Akashic Download} that uses the lens instead of a comm unit.

Telepathy Node.name: Telepathy Node
Telepathy Node.description: A rune-carved device of treated alloys and crystal the size of a pebble is implanted into your brain's communication center. You gain limited telepathy to a range of 30 feet.

Jetpack (Tactical).name: Jetpack (Tactical)
Jetpack (Tactical).description:
Boosters attached to your armor allow you to fly.

Activate—Fly 1 (manipulate)

Effect You activate a jetpack to gain a fly Speed of 40 feet. This effect lasts for 1 minute or until you Dismiss it. You can use an action to Fly 0 feet to hover in place, but you're @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} while doing so. A jetpack can't lift you if you're encumbered.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.0kP4P73w0PykYkPY]{Effect: Jetpack}

Aegis Series.name: Aegis Series
Aegis Series.description:
Upgrades: 0

Aegis armor suits are starmetal-infused shells that encase the wearer entirely, including an attached visorless helmet that's often sculpted into a custom style. Sensors built into the suit feed sensory information to the wearer, and powered limbs aid maneuvers. Movement in an aegis suit is clumsy, but powerful.

Null Space Chamber (Commercial).name: Null Space Chamber (Commercial)
Null Space Chamber (Commercial).description:
This sleek black device attaches to a backpack, purse, or key ring. When you press a button on the side of the device, it creates a circular portal to an extradimensional pocket space. The space's capacity depends on the device's type.

You can Interact with the null space chamber to stow items in it or remove them. The null space chamber can be opened and closed only from the outside. When a null space chamber is opened in an atmosphere with air, it fills with 10 minutes' worth of air for every Bulk left in its capacity. An item inside the null space chamber provides no benefits unless it's retrieved first. Connecting the null space chamber to a computer causes it to display a readout of all items stored within it.

Capacity 25 Bulk

Incendiary Grenade (Commercial).name: Incendiary Grenade (Commercial)
Incendiary Grenade (Commercial).description:
Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical 5 feet

These grenades use an ignited chemical to explode in a blast of intense heat and deal 1d8 fire damage with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save (@Template[burst|distance:5]). If you have access to the critical specialization effect of grenades, creatures who critically fail their saving throw against incendiary grenades are knocked away from the grenade.

Lock (Elite).name: Lock (Elite)
Lock (Elite).description: Picking an elite lock requires six successful [[/act pick-a-lock dc=40]]{DC 40 Thievery} checks.

Skyfire Armor.name: Skyfire Armor
Skyfire Armor.description:
Upgrades: 0

These decorative suits of medium armor feature exaggerated shoulder guards, stylized dragon wings, and draconic emblems across the breastplate's back and chest. Skyfire armor is often plated with gold or other attractive metals, sacrificing upgrade space for style.

Machine Gun.name: Machine Gun
Machine Gun.description:
Upgrades: 1

These proven and reliable automatic weapons are capable of firing in short bursts or completely emptying their magazines to clear a battlefield.

Energy Shielding (Advanced).name: Energy Shielding (Advanced)
Energy Shielding (Advanced).description: This armor is specially treated with insulation to protect against a specific type of damage. You gain resistance 15 to acid, cold, electricity, or fire. The crafter chooses the damage type when creating the upgrade. Multiple energy shielding upgrades can be placed into a suit of armor, but each must provide resistance to a different damage type.

Mobility Enhancer (Commercial).name: Mobility Enhancer (Commercial)
Mobility Enhancer (Commercial).description: Automated braces help you to move faster in bulky armor. Reduce your armor's penalty to Speeds by 5 feet.

Data Chip.name: Data Chip
Data Chip.description: A data chip contains enough memory for a religious text, photo album, personal journal, or the like. You can view the information on a data chip with a computer, such as the one in your comm unit.

Basic Environmental Protection.name: Basic Environmental Protection
Basic Environmental Protection.description: This upgrade protects the user against the effects of space as well as thick and thin atmospheres. This armor loses the exposed trait for as long as the upgrade is installed.

Cycling Crystal.name: Cycling Crystal
Cycling Crystal.description:
A cycling crystal gives you greater control over the cycle of energies flowing through your solar manifestations.

Activate—Halt Cycle f (concentrate)

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Trigger You critically hit with your solar weapon or solar flare as part of an action with the cycle trait

Effect You can choose whether to change your attunement state or remain in your current attunement state.

Estex Suit.name: Estex Suit
Estex Suit.description:
Upgrades: 1

This bulky flight suit is reinforced with thin polycarbon panels sewn between layers of tactical fabric.

Silencer (Tactical).name: Silencer (Tactical)
Silencer (Tactical).description:
A cylinder is filled with internal sound baffles to reduce noise. The weapon doesn't make a loud noise when fired. However, creatures hit by the ammunition might still cry out in pain.

A tactical silencer is a hybrid item with the magical and tech traits. Shots fired from a tactical silencer magically dampen sounds around them. On a critically successful Strike, the target becomes unable to make sound. The target can't use sonic attacks, nor can it use actions with the auditory trait. This also prevents the target from casting spells due to the incantations or sounds involved in casting, with the exception of subtle spells. The target can resist the effects of the silencer with a successful @Check[will|dc:27] save.

Cryopike.name: Cryopike
Cryopike.description:
Upgrades: 1

This polearm's shaft houses rapidly circulating supercooled gas that condenses and channels endothermic energy into a cryogenic blade.

Autorecognition Lens.name: Autorecognition Lens
Autorecognition Lens.description: An artificial eye lens microscopically wired into your brain automatically tracks a database of associated names and faces as you meet or interact with individuals. After you've learned someone's name and appearance, a tiny HUD displays their name to you whenever you're looking at them as long as you're aware of their presence and their appearance hasn't dramatically changed (at the GM's discretion). This doesn't help you see or identify people who are trying to hide or disguise their appearance. This augmentation doesn't count toward your implant limit.

Active Camouflage (Advanced).name: Active Camouflage (Advanced)
Active Camouflage (Advanced).description: Hardlight projectors shift the appearance of your armor using shifting colors and patterns that respond to your environment. You gain a +3 item bonus to Stealth checks while wearing the armor.

Fly Spell Amp.name: Fly Spell Amp
Fly Spell Amp.description:
Known on most worlds as "spell amps," spell ampoules are ready-to-use magic injections that confer the benefits of a spell of the specified rank.

Activate—Inject 1 (manipulate)

Effect 4th-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.A2JfEKe6BZcTG1S8]{Fly} spell

Jump Spell Amp.name: Jump Spell Amp
Jump Spell Amp.description:
Known on most worlds as "spell amps," spell ampoules are ready-to-use magic injections that confer the benefits of a spell of the specified rank.

Activate—Inject 1 (manipulate)

Effect 1st-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Q7QQ91vQtyi1Ux36]{Jump} spell

Undermounted Grenade Launcher (Tactical).name: Undermounted Grenade Launcher (Tactical)
Undermounted Grenade Launcher (Tactical).description:
This bracket-mounted grenade launcher is most often advertised for use with fragmentation grenades, but can efficiently deploy utility ordinances, such as smoke grenades and flashbangs. Unlike a dedicated grenade launcher, it takes 10 minutes to load an undermounted grenade launcher, reassembling the grenade into ammunition by mounting it on a specialized reusable firing cap. Once a grenade has been loaded, it can only be safely removed by disassembling the entire grenade, destroying it in the process.

This grenade launcher has a range of 30 feet and the tracking +1 trait.

Activate—Launch 1 (attack)

Effect You launch the loaded grenade.

Grenade Launcher (Tactical).name: Grenade Launcher (Tactical)
Grenade Launcher (Tactical).description:
Upgrades 1

Activate 2 Area Fire

The rotating barrel of this automatic breechloading launcher holds up to six grenades of any variety with smart loading technology, allowing its wielder to choose a different grenade each time they fire. A grenade launcher is a martial ranged weapon, has a reload of 2, and a range 350 feet.

Photon Crystal (Commercial).name: Photon Crystal (Commercial)
Photon Crystal (Commercial).description: A photon crystal increases the flow of photon into your solar manifestations, burning and blinding your foes. While photon attuned, your solar weapon or solar flare deals an extra @Damage[1d6[fire]] damage. On a critical hit while you're photon attuned, the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:23] save or be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round.

Glow Up Spell Amp (Commercial).name: Glow Up Spell Amp (Commercial)
Glow Up Spell Amp (Commercial).description:
Known on most worlds as "spell amps," spell ampoules are ready-to-use magic injections that confer the benefits of a spell of the specified rank.

Activate—Inject 1 (manipulate)

Effect 1st-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.V1cojmrEOWkJ1yPF]{Glow Up} spell

Shrouding Sphere.name: Shrouding Sphere
Shrouding Sphere.description:
This glass sphere is filled with a swirling purple gas and exudes a faint floral fragrance.

Activate—Shake it Out 1 (manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Effect You shake the sphere, causing the gas inside to seep through the glass and coil around you, obscuring your motions. You become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} against ranged attacks for 3 rounds. In addition, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Stealth checks to [[/act hide]] for the duration. This gas can be dispersed by strong wind, ending the effects early.

Activate—Yeet it Out 1 (manipulate)

Effect You throw the sphere, granting one creature within 60 feet the benefits of Shake it Out for 1 minute. This causes the orb to shatter, gaining the consumable trait.

Medpatch (Tactical).name: Medpatch (Tactical)
Medpatch (Tactical).description:
Activate 1 (manipulate)

Medpatches accelerate the body's natural healing. You regain @Damage[(3d6+6)[healing]] Hit Points and gain a +1 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{Effect: Medpatch}

Speed Suspension (Commercial).name: Speed Suspension (Commercial)
Speed Suspension (Commercial).description: High-performance cybernetics replace the joints and tendons in your legs. You gain a +5-foot item bonus to your land Speed.

Smoke Grenade (Advanced).name: Smoke Grenade (Advanced)
Smoke Grenade (Advanced).description:
Activate 1 Area Fire

This grenade unleashes a cloud of concealing smoke in a @Template[burst|distance:15]. Creatures within the area have the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} condition, and all other creatures are concealed to them. The smoke lasts for 1 minute or until dissipated by a strong wind or similar effect.

Stellar Cannon.name: Stellar Cannon
Stellar Cannon.description:
Upgrades: 1

The rounds of this portable cannon are loaded with carefully positioned mini-missiles packed with flechettes that shred anyone too close to the blast.

Machine Mind Serum (Advanced).name: Machine Mind Serum (Advanced)
Machine Mind Serum (Advanced).description:
Activate 1 (manipulate)

When you inject this serum, magitech nanites infuse your body with machine-like circuitry that pulses and glows beneath your skin. For 1 hour, you gain a +3 item bonus to saving throws against mental effects. You also gain resistance 15 to mental damage. Due to your more machine-like nature, you gain weakness 15 to electricity.

Datapad.name: Datapad
Datapad.description: These ubiquitous handheld computers incorporate a comm unit, microphone, speaker, camera, infosphere browser, and data storage. They can store thousands of hours of recordings, play games, and perform simple computing functions, such as time tracking and notifications, word processing, calculations, data processing, streaming media, and broadcasting emergency alerts from local governments. In most societies, commercial datapads are relatively flimsy, designed to rapidly wear out or fall behind on the latest features and updates to encourage the consumer to replace it with a newer model. In contrast, higher-end datapads are made to last and often include a sturdier chassis and extra functions.

Defrex Hide.name: Defrex Hide
Defrex Hide.description:
Upgrades: 1

Made from the hide of a ferocious mammal native to Vesk-2, this medium armor is especially popular among vesk. Tanned slabs of the creature's thick hide are stitched together with metal wires, and the joints are reinforced with metal studs or scales.

Photosynthetic Skin.name: Photosynthetic Skin
Photosynthetic Skin.description: Specialized nanites enhance your natural surface cells, allowing them to convert solar radiation into nourishment for your body. You don't need to eat, and you're never @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} as a result of hunger or starvation as long as you spend at least 1 hour per day basking in direct sunlight. You can bask as part of a normal 8-hour rest period.

Entropic Destabilizer (Commercial).name: Entropic Destabilizer (Commercial)
Entropic Destabilizer (Commercial).description: Tendrils of dark energy soar from the unit affixed to this weapon, coating it and its ammunition in a disturbing purple hue. When you hit with the weapon, add 1d4 void damage to the damage dealt. In addition, on a critical hit, the target takes 2d4 persistent void damage; if the target has a shield raised, the shield takes the same amount of persistent damage (its wielder rolls the flat check to see if the persistent damage ends, or the GM rolls if the shield is no longer in someone's possession). Unlike normal void damage, the void damage from an entropic destabilizer damages objects, constructs, and the like by eroding them away.

Vesk Scales.name: Vesk Scales
Vesk Scales.description: Your ancestors were the hardiest specimens of vesk, having traveled far and wide while enduring hostile environments. Your scales count as medium armor in the plate armor group. They grant a +3 item bonus to AC, have a Dex cap of +1, a check penalty of –2, and a Strength threshold of +3, and have the comfort and exposed traits. This item bonus increases to +4 at 5th level. You can wear a flight suit, but you can't wear other armor. You can etch armor runes onto your scales, but you can't install armor upgrades.

Feline Senses Spell Amp.name: Feline Senses Spell Amp
Feline Senses Spell Amp.description:
Known on most worlds as "spell amps," spell ampoules are ready-to-use magic injections that confer the benefits of a spell of the specified rank.

Activate—Inject 1 (manipulate)

Type feline senses spell amp; Level 7; Price 530 credits

Effect 3rd-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.1lv6Zmp2eWRIPn1n]{Feline Senses} spell

Aeon Stone (Projecting).name: Aeon Stone (Projecting)
Aeon Stone (Projecting).description:
Staple items within the Azlanti Star Empire, these gemstones are popular status symbols for adventurers and wealthy collectors. Despite their myriad forms and functions, these stones are purportedly all fragments of crystal tools used by otherworldly entities to build the Universe in ancient times.

When you invest one of these precisely shaped crystals, the stone orbits your head (or another visible part of your anatomy if you don't have a head) instead of being worn on your body. You can stow an aeon stone with an Interact action, and an orbiting stone can be snatched out of the air with a successful @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Dt6B1slsBy8ipJu9]{Disarm} action against you. A stowed or removed stone remains invested, but its effects are @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} until you return it to orbit your head again.

There are various types of aeon stones, each with a different appearance and magical effect. Each aeon stone also gains a resonant power when slotted into specific items, such as weapons with the aeon trait or antique magical devices called wayfinders.

This opalescent sapphire cone grants you a limited form of projected empathy with a range of 100 feet that can be roughly understood by creatures regardless of language and includes a type and intensity of emotion, such as "mild anger," "intense joy," or "deep sadness." When you Sense the Motive of a creature within 30 feet, you detect the presence or absence of thoughts from the creature as though you cast the 1-action version of @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.qOLMHvkAGsVYLhtn]{Detect Thoughts}. The resonant power allows you to cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.uBo6g5aW087cLSJR]{Mind Skewer} as a 1st-rank occult innate spell once per day.

Presence Intensifier.name: Presence Intensifier
Presence Intensifier.description:
This augmentation strengthens your personality, intensifying the parts of you that form the core of your identity. You gain a +2 item bonus to Diplomacy and Intimidation checks. When you get this augmentation, you either increase your Charisma modifier by 1 or increase it to +4, whichever would give you a higher value.

Activate—Irresistible Idea 2 (concentrate)

Frequency once per hour

Effect You manipulate your cosmetics to influence a creature as a 4th-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.qwlh6aDgi86U3Q7H]{Suggestion} (DC 38).

+1 Weapon Potency Crystal.name: +1 Weapon Potency Crystal
+1 Weapon Potency Crystal.description: This item crystallizes the focus needed to replicate the actions of a star. Attack rolls with the solar weapon or flare gain a +1 item bonus, and the weapon or flare can benefit from one orbital crystal.

Celebrity Serum.name: Celebrity Serum
Celebrity Serum.description:
Activate 1 (manipulate)

This fizzy pink concoction is mildly intoxicating and grants a +1 item bonus to Performance checks for 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.dCDZQr7EBfCALmT2]{Effect: Celebrity Serum}

Spell Gem (7th-Rank Spell).name: Spell Gem (7th-Rank Spell)
Spell Gem (7th-Rank Spell).description:
These latticed gemstones are suspended in a silicon casing and encoded with the magical script necessary to cast a single, specific spell. Casting a spell from a spell gem requires holding the gem in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell. The spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack modifier and spell DC. The spell must be of your spellcasting tradition. The spell in a spell gem can be cast only once, and the spell gem is destroyed as part of the casting. Spell gems can't contain cantrips or rituals. The traits for this item vary based on the spell it contains.

Activate Cast a Spell

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated rank.

Crystallized Shockshard (Tactical).name: Crystallized Shockshard (Tactical)
Crystallized Shockshard (Tactical).description:
Activate f (concentrate)

Trigger You deal damage to a creature with the weapon.

This electric-blue crystal crackles with energy. When you activate the shockshard, the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:17] save or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} for 1 minute. If the target has the tech trait, it instead becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 1}.

Maneuvering Unit (Commercial).name: Maneuvering Unit (Commercial)
Maneuvering Unit (Commercial).description:
Internal stabilizers and jets synchronize your movements in zero gravity. You aren't @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} or clumsy while @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.z1ucw4CLwLqHoAp3]{Untethered}.

Activate—Thrust 1 (move)

Requirements You're in a zero-g environment

Effect You move 5 feet in any direction you choose. You begin to float in that direction.

Petrified Bark.name: Petrified Bark
Petrified Bark.description:
Note Petrified heritage only

Your body is covered in thick, plated bark.
