Your bark is medium armor in the plate armor group that grants a +4 item bonus to AC, has a Dex cap of +1, a check penalty of –2, a Speed penalty of –5 feet, a Strength value of 16, and has the bulwark, comfort, and exposed traits. You can never wear other armor or remove the bark. You can etch armor runes onto the bark.

Zero Knife.name: Zero Knife
Zero Knife.description:
Upgrades: 1

Unfolding like a switchblade, a supercooled chamber within this weapon instantly forms a blade of ice.

Holoskin (Commercial).name: Holoskin (Commercial)
Holoskin (Commercial).description: A holographic projector mounted to a belt or limb strap can be activated as an Interact action. It can be programmed to project the appearance of another creature of the same size category as yourself, hiding your true appearance. A holoskin doesn't change your voice, scent, or mannerisms. The appearance of held and worn items aren't affected. You usually need a holoskin to set up a disguise in order to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate} someone using the Deception skill.

Semi-Auto Pistol.name: Semi-Auto Pistol
Semi-Auto Pistol.description:
Upgrades: 1

This pistol automatically ejects used cartridges and loads new ammunition after every shot fired.

Tailblade.name: Tailblade
Tailblade.description:
Upgrades: 1

Adjustable bands secure this lightweight blade to a tail, tentacle, or similar appendage.

Climbing Kit (Commercial).name: Climbing Kit (Commercial)
Climbing Kit (Commercial).description:
A commercial climbing kit includes 50 feet of cable line, a grappling hook, harnesses, pulleys, pitons, a hammer, and crampons. Climbing kits allow you to attach yourself to the wall you're Climbing, moving half as quickly as usual (minimum 5 feet) but letting you attempt a @Check[flat|dc:5] whenever you critically fail to prevent a fall.

A single kit has only enough materials for one climber; each climber needs their own kit.

Medpatch (Elite).name: Medpatch (Elite)
Medpatch (Elite).description:
Activate 1 (manipulate)

Medpatches accelerate the body's natural healing. You regain @Damage[(8d6+21)[healing]] Hit Points and gain a +3 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{Effect: Medpatch}

Necrolung (Superior).name: Necrolung (Superior)
Necrolung (Superior).description:
Spongy black webbing radiates from a grayish purple mass of necrotized flesh that pulses when it's exposed to air. Specially grown in vats from waste produced in the necrograft manufacturing process, necrolungs allow living creatures to breathe efficiently and safely on Eox, becoming effectively immune to the toxins in its atmosphere for an additional 24 hours per level, and you gain a +3 item bonus to saves against diseases and poisons.

Installing a necrolung takes one minute and requires no skill checks. When installed, a necrolung slithers down your throat (or appropriate alien anatomy) and integrates into your respiratory system. Most users notice a harmless pallor and rotting smell while using the tech.

Gluon Crystal (Advanced).name: Gluon Crystal (Advanced)
Gluon Crystal (Advanced).description: A gluon crystal harnesses entropy to cause serious lasting wounds. Your solar weapon or solar flare deals an extra @Damage[1d8[persistent,bleed]] damage. On a critical hit, the target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} until it recovers from the persistent bleed damage.

Frag Grenade (Elite).name: Frag Grenade (Elite)
Frag Grenade (Elite).description:
Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @Damage[1d6[bleed]]

These fragmentary grenades explode in a cloud of shrapnel and deal 10d8 piercing damage in a @Template[burst|distance:15] with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save.

Antigrav Harness (Commercial).name: Antigrav Harness (Commercial)
Antigrav Harness (Commercial).description:
This convoluted web of synthweave straps is worn as a fashion statement in some subcultures but has a useful application in extreme environments. You gain a +1 item bonus to Acrobatics checks, and you aren't @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} or clumsy while untethered in zero-g.

Activate—Gravity Alteration 1 (manipulate)

Effect You treat gravity as being one step higher or lower (for example, zero-g becomes low gravity, low gravity becomes standard, standard gravity becomes high gravity, and high gravity becomes extreme gravity, or vice versa). This only affects you, your gear, and your movement and lasts until the end of your next turn.

Reality Ripper.name: Reality Ripper
Reality Ripper.description:
This sleek rifle converts energy into projectiles of concentrated magic that tears apart matter by destroying its bindings to the reality. A reality ripper is modular and has two modes: destructive and reaping. While in destructive mode, the reality ripper deals acid damage and gains the razing trait. While in reaping mode, a reality ripper deals void damage and gains the concussive trait.

A realty ripper's minimum weapon improvement is tactical, meaning its tracking +1 cannot be removed, though further improvements can be still applied.

Flash Grenade (Paragon).name: Flash Grenade (Paragon)
Flash Grenade (Paragon).description:
Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical dazzled for 2 rounds

A flash grenade unleashes a blast of bright light that requires creatures in a @Template[burst|distance:5] to attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:class] save. On a failure, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round.

Hypopen (Tactical).name: Hypopen (Tactical)
Hypopen (Tactical).description:
This tiny cylinder contains specialized nanites that either

  • Remove the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} condition
  • Decrease the value of the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened} condition by 1.

Shirren-eye Rifle.name: Shirren-eye Rifle
Shirren-eye Rifle.description:
Upgrades: 1

This sniper rifle comes with a compound technological scope that allows snipers to adjust focus and magnification with natural eye movements instead of using moving parts that might disrupt their aim.

Frag Grenade (Ultimate).name: Frag Grenade (Ultimate)
Frag Grenade (Ultimate).description:
Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @Damage[1d8[bleed]]

These fragmentary grenades explode in a cloud of shrapnel and deal 12d8 piercing damage in a @Template[burst|distance:20] with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save.

Gluon Crystal (Superior).name: Gluon Crystal (Superior)
Gluon Crystal (Superior).description: A gluon crystal harnesses entropy to cause serious lasting wounds. Your solar weapon or solar flare deals an extra @Damage[1d10[persistent,bleed]] damage. On a critical hit, the target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} until it recovers from the persistent bleed damage.

Smoke Grenade (Superior).name: Smoke Grenade (Superior)
Smoke Grenade (Superior).description:
Activate 1 Area Fire

This grenade unleashes a cloud of concealing smoke in a @Template[burst|distance:30]. Creatures within the area have the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} condition, and all other creatures are concealed to them. The smoke lasts for 1 minute or until dissipated by a strong wind or similar effect.

Arc Pistol.name: Arc Pistol
Arc Pistol.description:
Upgrades: 1

Instead of traditional ammunition, this bulky pistol contains a capacitor that generates arcs of electricity. Its stock is crafted from polycarbon or other synthetic insulators, often tinted bright yellow and inscribed with the universal bolt symbol for high voltage.

Reusable Grenade Shell.name: Reusable Grenade Shell
Reusable Grenade Shell.description:
This ordinance was originally shaped like a brutaris ball and intended to add both visual effects and additional risk to the already dangerous game. You can throw the shell to explode the installed grenade, using the grenade's range, damage, and other effects. The shell remains and repairs the grenade over the course of 24 hours, during which time you can't install another grenade. The shell is too large for a grenade launcher.

Activate—Install Grenade 1 (manipulate) You install a commercial, tactical, or advanced grenade in the shell. You can store one grenade in the shell at a time, and you can Interact to retrieve the grenade normally.

Maratan Headache (Advanced).name: Maratan Headache (Advanced)
Maratan Headache (Advanced).description:
Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{sickened 1}

Maratan headaches are made from brittle hollow gourds filled with a putrid sludge, dealing 3d8 nonlethal poison damage in a @Template[burst|distance:10] with a @Check[fortitude|against:class|basic] save.

Hardlight Handwraps (Superior).name: Hardlight Handwraps (Superior)
Hardlight Handwraps (Superior).description:
Upgrades 2

These handwraps can be customized to shine in any color in the visible spectrum when used, and some manufacturers offer custom firmware that modifies their appearance to manifest as a claw, oversized fist, or hammerhead. They can even be worn in alternate ways on other parts of the body. These handwraps enhance your unarmed attacks as if they were manufactured weapons, allowing you to add an upgrade to your unarmed attacks. Treat the handwraps as melee weapons in the brawling group with light Bulk for these purposes.

Your unarmed attacks gain the tracking +2 trait and increase the damage to two dice.

Irising Shield.name: Irising Shield
Irising Shield.description: An irising shield is made of flexible polycarbon with a retractable design. When retracted, an irising shield looks like a decorative bangle, gauntlet, or glove. When deployed, its panels flare out and form a miniature circular shield.

Camping Kit.name: Camping Kit
Camping Kit.description: A camping kit contains a weatherproof tent for four Medium or two Large creatures, bedrolls, a fire igniter, 1 week of rations, and a survival knife.

Lock (Tactical).name: Lock (Tactical)
Lock (Tactical).description: Picking a tactical lock requires two successful [[/act pick-a-lock dc=20]]{DC 20 Thievery} checks.

Puzzleblade.name: Puzzleblade
Puzzleblade.description:
Upgrades: 1

This kasathan sword breaks down into interlocking pieces for storage and transport. Traditionalists practice the art of ritually assembling puzzleblades, with different pieces symbolizing the kasathan virtues of conviction, dedication, moderation, and tradition. Criminals and smugglers value the puzzleblade for its discreet design.

Force Field (Advanced).name: Force Field (Advanced)
Force Field (Advanced).description:
Force fields absorb damage. A force field's Hit Points are based on its version. While your force field is active, any physical or energy damage you would take is applied to the force field's Hit Points first before being applied to your Hit Points (including temporary Hit Points). If you have a shield raised, your force field and shield both take damage. If damage from an attack or effect reduces the force field to 0 Hit Points, you take any excess damage, the force field deactivates, and it can't be activated again for 10 minutes. Force fields replenish the indicated number of Hit Points each round at the beginning of your turn while they're active.

If your force field is tactical or better, it also protects you from deadly blows. Each time you're critically hit while your force field is active, attempt a flat check against the listed DC. On a success, it becomes a normal hit.

The force field has 20 Hit Points and replenishes 4 Hit Points on your turn, and @Check[flat|dc:19].

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.7CtHz1DQcMXLafOS]{Effect: Force Field 20}

Activate—Raise Force Field 1 (manipulate)

Frequency three times per day

Effect Your force field becomes active. It remains active for 1 minute or until it's reduced to 0 Hit Points.

Crystallized Shockshard (Elite).name: Crystallized Shockshard (Elite)
Crystallized Shockshard (Elite).description:
Activate f (concentrate)

Trigger You deal damage to a creature with the weapon.

This electric-blue crystal crackles with energy. When you activate the shockshard, the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:29] save or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} for 1 minute. If the target has the tech trait, it instead becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 2}.

Force Needle.name: Force Needle
Force Needle.description:
Upgrades: 1

When a full vial of liquid is inserted into the bottom of this weapon's hilt, it creates an energy needle to hold and inject its payload.

Spell Gem (3rd-Rank Spell).name: Spell Gem (3rd-Rank Spell)
Spell Gem (3rd-Rank Spell).description:
These latticed gemstones are suspended in a silicon casing and encoded with the magical script necessary to cast a single, specific spell. Casting a spell from a spell gem requires holding the gem in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell. The spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack modifier and spell DC. The spell must be of your spellcasting tradition. The spell in a spell gem can be cast only once, and the spell gem is destroyed as part of the casting. Spell gems can't contain cantrips or rituals. The traits for this item vary based on the spell it contains.

Activate Cast a Spell

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated rank.

Zero Pistol.name: Zero Pistol
Zero Pistol.description:
Upgrades: 1

Zero pistols use transparent canisters of supercooled liquid as ammunition.

Quantum Reaver.name: Quantum Reaver
Quantum Reaver.description:
The edge of this glowing, several-foot-long blade wavers and blurs, and reality seems to fracture when it's swung, offering fleeting glimpses of other worlds along its path. The quantum reaver is an advanced-grade weapon, and can be improved as normal.

Activate—Spatial Slice 2

Frequency once every 10 minutes

Effect You phase the quantum reaver through space-time, making a melee Strike against any creature within 30 feet as if you were adjacent to it. On a critical hit, the target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 3 rounds.

Ultralight Wings (Superior).name: Ultralight Wings (Superior)
Ultralight Wings (Superior).description: Foldable wings are attached to your shoulder blades or a similar location on your body that allows them to lift your weight and assist your flying movements. You can deploy the wings with an Interact action, but you can't deploy or use them while you're wearing more than light armor. While the wings are deployed and you're not encumbered, you gain a fly Speed of 60 feet and a +2 item bonus to Acrobatics checks to Maneuver in Flight.

Shuriken Drone.name: Shuriken Drone
Shuriken Drone.description:
Upgrades: 1

This star-shaped weapon surrounds a tiny single rotor drone designed to return to its thrower if it doesn't hit its target.

Crystallized Shockshard (Superior).name: Crystallized Shockshard (Superior)
Crystallized Shockshard (Superior).description:
Activate f (concentrate)

Trigger You deal damage to a creature with the weapon.

This electric-blue crystal crackles with energy. When you activate the shockshard, the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:25] save or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} for 1 minute. If the target has the tech trait, it instead becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 2}.

Aeon Rifle.name: Aeon Rifle
Aeon Rifle.description:
Upgrades: 0

A mainstay of the Azlanti Star Empire, this sleek laser rifle includes a slot for aeon stones to enhance and focus the intensity of its beams.

Plasma Caster.name: Plasma Caster
Plasma Caster.description:
Upgrades: 1

This compact pistol shoots balls of condensed plasma. Holding down the trigger and safety clip at the same time before firing results in the barrel building up more plasma.

Dreamlink Serum.name: Dreamlink Serum
Dreamlink Serum.description:
Activate 1 (manipulate)

A glossy purple syrup swirled with streaks of black and green. After drinking this serum, your mind drifts and latches onto psychic impressions from the Newborn, granting you esoteric knowledge and alien wisdom at the expense of your current awareness. You gain a +2 item bonus to Occultism and Religion checks for 10 minutes. Once during the duration, you can roll a check to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} twice and use the better result (this is a fortune effect); if you roll a 1 or a 20 twice using this fortune effect, you glimpse the silhouette of a mysterious figure in the corner of your eye and become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Dermal Plating (Elite).name: Dermal Plating (Elite)
Dermal Plating (Elite).description: Hardened plates protect your skin and help you deflect physical blows. A limb with dermal plating functions as a shield. You can Raise a Shield with your limb, giving you a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of your next turn, but it doesn't require a hand to use. You can use the Shield Block reaction with your limb. Dermal plating has Hardness 25. After you use Shield Block, your dermal plating becomes damaged and can't be used for 24 hours as the nanites repair the durable plates.

Frost Module (Tactical).name: Frost Module (Tactical)
Frost Module (Tactical).description:
This module siphons the heat from the weapon's striking edge and ammunition, powering itself with the excess energy as it chills the air around it. It deals an additional 1d6 cold damage on a successful Strike. On a critical hit, the target is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} until the end of your next turn unless it succeeds at a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:34] save.

Cold damage dealt by this weapon ignores the target's cold resistance.

Explosive Defense Unit.name: Explosive Defense Unit
Explosive Defense Unit.description:
Reinforced custom armor plates automatically generate a containment field to protect you from nearby explosions, granting you resistance 2 to area damage (acid, cold, electricity, and fire damage only). You can also store a grenade in the explosive defense unit and detonate it without harming yourself.

Activate—Store Grenade 2 (manipulate)

Effect You place a grenade inside a reinforced compartment in the explosive defense unit. You can Interact to retrieve the grenade normally. You can store only one grenade in the armor upgrade at a time.

Activate—Defensive Detonation 1 (manipulate)

Requirements You have a stored grenade

Effect You detonate the grenade stored in the explosive defense unit. The explosion is centered on your space, but the upgrade generates a containment field to protect you from its effects. The grenade otherwise functions as if you'd activated it normally.

Smoke Grenade (Paragon).name: Smoke Grenade (Paragon)
Smoke Grenade (Paragon).description:
Activate 1 Area Fire

This grenade unleashes a cloud of concealing smoke in a @Template[burst|distance:100]. Creatures within the area have the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} condition, and all other creatures are concealed to them. The smoke lasts for 1 minute or until dissipated by a strong wind or similar effect.

Shielding Skin (Commercial).name: Shielding Skin (Commercial)
Shielding Skin (Commercial).description: Your skin is biologically engineered to protect your entire body, including your brain, from harmful effects. You gain a +1 item bonus to saving throws.

Loudener (Tactical).name: Loudener (Tactical)
Loudener (Tactical).description:
This specialized cone is installed over the muzzle or hilt of a weapon to use pneumonic pulses and passive acoustics to increase the volume of its attacks. It deals an extra 1d6 sonic damage. On a critical hit, the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:34] save or be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened} for 1 minute (or 1 hour on a critical failure).

Sonic damage dealt by this weapon ignores the target's sonic resistance.

Thermal Capacitor (Advanced).name: Thermal Capacitor (Advanced)
Thermal Capacitor (Advanced).description: This armor upgrade regulates heat, protecting you from extreme temperatures. You're protected from extreme cold and mild heat.

Grenade Launcher (Ultimate).name: Grenade Launcher (Ultimate)
Grenade Launcher (Ultimate).description:
Upgrades 3

Activate 2 Area Fire

The rotating barrel of this automatic breechloading launcher holds up to six grenades of any variety with smart loading technology, allowing its wielder to choose a different grenade each time they fire. A grenade launcher is a martial ranged weapon, has a reload of 2, and a range 490 feet.

Battle Ribbon.name: Battle Ribbon
Battle Ribbon.description:
Upgrades: 1

This sheer nanocarbon ribbon is sharp enough to cut through flesh without interrupting the traditional battle dances that make the weapon famous.

Retinal Reflectors.name: Retinal Reflectors
Retinal Reflectors.description: These sheets of reflective material, implanted in your visual organs, enhance your vision without changing your appearance. You gain low-light vision and a +1 item bonus to Perception checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} if they involve sight.

Electromag Grenade (Tactical).name: Electromag Grenade (Tactical)
Electromag Grenade (Tactical).description:
Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 1}

These grenades discharge a shocking field that deals 2d8 electricity damage in a @Template[burst|distance:10] with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save. If you have access to the critical specialization effect of grenades, tech creatures and unattended tech items that critically fail their saving throw against electromag grenades become glitching.

Spell Chip (6th-Rank Spell).name: Spell Chip (6th-Rank Spell)
Spell Chip (6th-Rank Spell).description:
Usage installed in computer or comm unit;

These chips can be installed in comm units and other computers to allow the device to cast spells. Each device can have only one spell chip. Casting a spell from a spell chip requires holding the computer or comm unit in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell. The spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack modifier and spell DC. The spell must be of your spellcasting tradition. If the spell has a locus, you must still have that locus to cast the spell from a spell chip. Spell chips can't contain cantrips or rituals. The traits for this item vary based on the spell it contains.

In addition to the charge expended to Cast the Spell, the delicate components that make up the core lattice of a spell chip can be destroyed if used in quick succession. Attempting to use a spell chip more than once per day requires overclocking it. Cast the Spell again, then roll a @Check[flat|dc:10]. On a success, the spell chip is broken. On a failure, the spell chip is destroyed. If anyone tries to overclock a spell chip that's already been overclocked that day, the spell chip is automatically destroyed (even if it's been repaired) and no spell is cast.

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day, plus overclock

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated rank.

Electroencephalon.name: Electroencephalon
Electroencephalon.description:
This magical matrix records the consciousness, thoughts, and soul of a necrovite and also grants a limited form of telepathy. Such augmented psychic awareness is key to the process of preserving a necrovite's memories when their body is destroyed, including memories of whatever caused their destruction.

When a necrovite is destroyed, electroencephalon begins rebuilding their their physical form over the next 1d10 days. Not even disintegrating a necrovite's corpse can fully destroy the creature. The necrovite's new body manifests next to the electroencephalon, fully healed but without any equipment from their old body.

A standard electroencephalon is a piece of complex magitech about the size of a comm unit that has been constructed via occult means. This device typically has Hardness 10 and 40 HP.

Datajack (Tactical).name: Datajack (Tactical)
Datajack (Tactical).description:
This cybernetic is a programmable data port installed into your body, allowing you to access computers and digital storage devices. Any handheld computer can connect to the port, while larger systems typically require an adapter cable. You don't need an interface to access the system, as it connects directly to your nervous system via the datajack. You must still attempt any skill checks associated with operating the device, such as Computers to access a system. Some closed systems don't allow direct data access at all.

You gain a +1 item bonus to Computers checks when accessing a system with a tactical datajack.

Active Camouflage (Tactical).name: Active Camouflage (Tactical)
Active Camouflage (Tactical).description: Hardlight projectors shift the appearance of your armor using shifting colors and patterns that respond to your environment. You gain a +2 item bonus to Stealth checks while wearing the armor.

Hardlight Handwraps (Elite).name: Hardlight Handwraps (Elite)
Hardlight Handwraps (Elite).description:
Upgrades 3

These handwraps can be customized to shine in any color in the visible spectrum when used, and some manufacturers offer custom firmware that modifies their appearance to manifest as a claw, oversized fist, or hammerhead. They can even be worn in alternate ways on other parts of the body. These handwraps enhance your unarmed attacks as if they were manufactured weapons, allowing you to add an upgrade to your unarmed attacks. Treat the handwraps as melee weapons in the brawling group with light Bulk for these purposes.

Your unarmed attacks gain the tracking +2 trait and increase the damage to three dice.

Degradation Grenade (Ultimate).name: Degradation Grenade (Ultimate)
Degradation Grenade (Ultimate).description:
Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @Damage[1d8[persistent,acid]] damage

Degradation grenades create violent blasts of magic that rip matter into different realities, leaving behind blackened hunks of matter that dissipate into nothingness. When the grenade explodes, it deals 12d8 acid damage in a @Template[burst|distance:20] with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save.

Vocal Modulator.name: Vocal Modulator
Vocal Modulator.description: A series of miniature actuators and dynamic hyper-resonant chambers reshape your voice box. A vocal modulator allows you to change the pitch, timbre, and tone of your voice so you can imitate accents or pronounce alien languages. When using Deception to Impersonate, you gain a +1 item bonus if the change in your voice also helps your disguise (at the GM's discretion).

Great Absalom Relay Medal.name: Great Absalom Relay Medal
Great Absalom Relay Medal.description: This medal marks you as the winner of The Great Absalom Relay, and the embedded data drive contains a full recording of the event broadcast. Fans of the event recognize you while wearing it and are more willing to assist you. You gain a +1 item bonus to Diplomacy checks made to communicate with residents of Absalom Station.

Fire Extinguisher (Commercial).name: Fire Extinguisher (Commercial)
Fire Extinguisher (Commercial).description: A fire extinguishes sprays foam in a @Template[type:cone|distance:15], automatically putting out non-magical fires and attempting to counteract any magical fire effects at 2nd rank with a [[/r 1d20+7 #Counteract]]{+7} counteract modifier. A fire extinguisher expends one chem each time it's used and uses a commercial chem tank.

Doshko.name: Doshko
Doshko.description:
Upgrades: 1

The traditional weapon of the Veskarium, this powered poleaxe features one to three triangular blades forged for both wide overhead swings and tactical parrying.

Skyfire Sword.name: Skyfire Sword
Skyfire Sword.description:
Upgrades: 1

Famously wielded by warriors of the Skyfire Legion, this flaming blade is powered by burning gas held in place by magnetic fields.

Rotolaser.name: Rotolaser
Rotolaser.description:
Upgrades: 1

A rotolaser fires multiple beams of plasma at once. This massive assault rifle has a set of rotating barrels that prevent overheating when spewing auto-fire.

Fear Projector (Commercial).name: Fear Projector (Commercial)
Fear Projector (Commercial).description: This integrated hologram projector makes the wounds caused by the weapon look way worse than they are. When you critically hit with this weapon, the target becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Sonic Rifle.name: Sonic Rifle
Sonic Rifle.description:
Upgrades: 1

A sonic rifle creates a narrow beam of ultrasound that effectively turns whatever it hits into a speaker, breaking its targets apart with hypersonic vibrations.

Spell Gem (1st-Rank Spell).name: Spell Gem (1st-Rank Spell)
Spell Gem (1st-Rank Spell).description:
These latticed gemstones are suspended in a silicon casing and encoded with the magical script necessary to cast a single, specific spell. Casting a spell from a spell gem requires holding the gem in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell. The spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack modifier and spell DC. The spell must be of your spellcasting tradition. The spell in a spell gem can be cast only once, and the spell gem is destroyed as part of the casting. Spell gems can't contain cantrips or rituals. The traits for this item vary based on the spell it contains.

Activate Cast a Spell

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated rank.

Cairn Form Spell Amp (Tactical).name: Cairn Form Spell Amp (Tactical)
Cairn Form Spell Amp (Tactical).description:
Known on most worlds as "spell amps," spell ampoules are ready-to-use magic injections that confer the benefits of a spell of the specified rank.

Activate—Inject 1 (manipulate)

Effect 6th-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.HAaRcHfN4g83eSEC]{Cairn Form} spell

Incendiary Grenade (Elite).name: Incendiary Grenade (Elite)
Incendiary Grenade (Elite).description:
Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical 10 feet

These grenades use an ignited chemical to explode in a blast of intense heat and deal 10d8 fire damage with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save (@Template[burst|distance:15]). If you have access to the critical specialization effect of grenades, creatures who critically fail their saving throw against incendiary grenades are knocked away from the grenade.

Programmer's Plushie (Tactical).name: Programmer's Plushie (Tactical)
Programmer's Plushie (Tactical).description:
These miniatures come in many shapes, often resembling a programmer's personal avatar or popular media character, such as Captain Concierge or Zo!. The plush helps organize your thoughts; you gain a +2 item bonus to Computers checks.

Activate—Secret Password 1 (auditory)

Effect You whisper a secret passcode known only to yourself and your programmer's plushie, securing a computer, container, door, or lock from intrusion as a 3rd-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Azoh0BSoCASrA1lr]{Lock} with a DC of 25. Any creature can bypass this lock using the passcode while touching the target with the programmer's plushie.

Dragon Gland (Ultimate).name: Dragon Gland (Ultimate)
Dragon Gland (Ultimate).description:
With cutting edge surgery, you're implanted with an magical gland modified to function for a creature of your ancestry at the back of your throat. Choose your breath weapon's damage type when the organ is biocrafted from the following list: acid, cold, electricity, fire, or sonic. You gain the following activation.

Activate—Exhale 1 (manipulate)

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Effect Each creature in a @Template[type:cone|distance:15] takes @Damage[(14d6)[untyped]] damage with a @Check[reflex|dc:43|basic] save. The damage depends on the augmentation's version.

Dermal Plating (Advanced).name: Dermal Plating (Advanced)
Dermal Plating (Advanced).description: Hardened plates protect your skin and help you deflect physical blows. A limb with dermal plating functions as a shield. You can Raise a Shield with your limb, giving you a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of your next turn, but it doesn't require a hand to use. You can use the Shield Block reaction with your limb. Dermal plating has Hardness 15. After you use Shield Block, your dermal plating becomes damaged and can't be used for 24 hours as the nanites repair the durable plates.

Diva's Microphone (Tactical).name: Diva's Microphone (Tactical)
Diva's Microphone (Tactical).description:
This ostentatious crystal microphone is embellished with glimmering jewels and delicate lights that pulse in time to music. It functions as both a microphone and speaker, amplifying your voice loud enough for you to be heard clearly by all listeners up to 500 feet away, even if other ambient noise would otherwise block the sound. This doesn't increase the range or area of other auditory or linguistic effects, and physical barriers such as walls still block or muffle your voice as normal.

The diva's microphone grants a +2 item bonus to Performance checks attempted with it.

Activate—Grand Finale 2 (auditory)

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Effect Your song reaches an eardrum-bursting climax as you cast a 4th-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.QpP30fcEl4NGjHwo]{Sonic Scream} originating from your space (DC 27).

Maratan Headache (Commercial).name: Maratan Headache (Commercial)
Maratan Headache (Commercial).description:
Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{sickened 1}

Maratan headaches are made from brittle hollow gourds filled with a putrid sludge, dealing 1d8 nonlethal poison damage in a @Template[burst|distance:5] with a @Check[fortitude|against:class|basic] save.

Holospark.name: Holospark
Holospark.description: This tiny holoprojector is often disguised as an earring, lapel pin, or pendant, It stores a simple visual projection of personal flair, such as a halo or wings, accompanied by short audio, such as a clip of a popular song or a sound effect. Your holospark can be programmed with a computer, such as the one in your comm unit.

Shredskin (Advanced).name: Shredskin (Advanced)
Shredskin (Advanced).description:
This slate-gray garment ripples with necromantic energy. When worn properly, this magical bodysuit transforms the appearance of a living creature into that of an undead creature and grants a +3 item bonus to Stealth checks.

Activate—Necrotize 2 (manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Duration 1 hour (see text)

Effect The shredskin transforms your appearance into an undead version of yourself. Your disguise affects your visual appearance, sound, scent, and all other forms of detection, including lifesense. After the normal duration of this ability ends, you can extend it by 1 more hour by piercing yourself with hooks on the robe, causing you to lose @Damage[50[healing]] Hit Points. The duration can't be extended a second time, and if these Hit Points are healed, the effect ends immediately.

Medkit (Tactical).name: Medkit (Tactical)
Medkit (Tactical).description: These contain analgesics, bandages, sterile gauze, and suturing tools necessary for Medicine checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.MHLuKy4nQO2Z4Am1]{Administer First Aid}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.TC7OcDa7JlWbqMaN]{Treat Disease}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.KjoCEEmPGTeFE4hh]{Treat Poison}, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds}. Tactical medical toolkits provide a +1 item bonus to such checks. A medkit is a toolkit.

Streetsweeper.name: Streetsweeper
Streetsweeper.description:
Upgrades: 1

This enormous portable cannon uses speakers to broadcast dense ultrasonic waves powerful enough to sweep a street clean of anything in its path.

Machine Mind Serum (Commercial).name: Machine Mind Serum (Commercial)
Machine Mind Serum (Commercial).description:
Activate 1 (manipulate)

When you inject this serum, magitech nanites infuse your body with machine-like circuitry that pulses and glows beneath your skin. For 1 minute, you gain a +1 item bonus to saving throws against mental effects. You also gain resistance 5 to mental damage. Due to your more machine-like nature, you gain weakness 5 to electricity.

Shock Truncheon.name: Shock Truncheon
Shock Truncheon.description:
Upgrades: 1

Popular among security forces, this retractable baton discharges electricity with each Strike. A whirring device inside the grip generates voltage, creating a sound like a swarm of buzzing insects when it's fully charged.

Phase Shield.name: Phase Shield
Phase Shield.description: A phase shield is an intricate but durable technological device often worn strapped to a limb or belt that projects a protective hardlight barrier when deployed. Phase shields are translucent and tinted, with a wide variety of fully customizable colors and image projectors. Many wielders choose an image of a favorite celebrity, loved one, or pleasant scenery to bolster their fighting spirit in a dire situation.

Disintegration Lash.name: Disintegration Lash
Disintegration Lash.description:
Upgrades: 1

Appearing as an undulating black snake when powered, this whip crackles with red-tinged energy that sunders whatever it strikes at the atomic level.

Nano-Optics Node.name: Nano-Optics Node
Nano-Optics Node.description:
A crystalline nanocarbon node implanted in your occipital lobe connects to optic nerves by microscopic fibers. You can activate the node to overlay your normal vision with X-ray data. You can deactivate the overlay as a single action, which has the concentrate trait.

Activate—X-Ray Overlay 1 (concentrate)

Effect Your nano-optics node relays collected X-ray data directly to your eyes, overlaying your normal vision. You can see through most materials and walls within 60 feet. Your sight is blocked by 2 feet of wood or plastic, 1 foot of stone, 2 inches of common metal, or any amount of lead or any starmetal, and you can only see in black and white. Due to the distracting amount of visual information, you take a –2 circumstance penalty to Perception checks while the overlay is active.

Frag Grenade (Commercial).name: Frag Grenade (Commercial)
Frag Grenade (Commercial).description:
Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @Damage[1[bleed]]

These fragmentary grenades explode in a cloud of shrapnel and deal 1d8 piercing damage in a @Template[burst|distance:5] with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save.

Compact Shield.name: Compact Shield
Compact Shield.description: This sleek shield is a favorite of operatives and other mobile combatants. It's most common design is a polycarbon panel contoured to fit snugly over a forearm or other limb.

Dragon Gland (Elite).name: Dragon Gland (Elite)
Dragon Gland (Elite).description:
With cutting edge surgery, you're implanted with an magical gland modified to function for a creature of your ancestry at the back of your throat. Choose your breath weapon's damage type when the organ is biocrafted from the following list: acid, cold, electricity, fire, or sonic. You gain the following activation.

Activate—Exhale 1 (manipulate)

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Effect Each creature in a @Template[type:cone|distance:15] takes @Damage[(10d6)[untyped]] damage with a @Check[reflex|dc:37|basic] save. The damage depends on the augmentation's version.

Adaptive Energy Shielding.name: Adaptive Energy Shielding
Adaptive Energy Shielding.description:
This device changes the chemical composition of the insulation installed on your armor, reacting to different types of energy.

Activate—Adapt r

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Trigger You take acid, cold, electricity, or fire damage

Effect Your energy shielding upgrade changes to the triggering damage type. This lasts until you Adapt again or uninstall any adaptive energy shielding or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.fQxWOthZx2HZUEzZ]{Energy Shielding} upgrade from the same armor. If you have multiple energy shielding upgrades on this armor, choose one to change when you Adapt.

Arc Rifle.name: Arc Rifle
Arc Rifle.description:
Upgrades: 1

This rifle's oversized body contains a larger version of an arc pistol capacitor, with a short barrel and polycarbon stock designed to insulate the wielder from high voltage. The arc rifle's larger capacitor allows it to produce a charge with enough power to subdue a rampaging renkroda.

Spell Chip (7th-Rank Spell).name: Spell Chip (7th-Rank Spell)
Spell Chip (7th-Rank Spell).description:
Usage installed in computer or comm unit;

These chips can be installed in comm units and other computers to allow the device to cast spells. Each device can have only one spell chip. Casting a spell from a spell chip requires holding the computer or comm unit in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell. The spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack modifier and spell DC. The spell must be of your spellcasting tradition. If the spell has a locus, you must still have that locus to cast the spell from a spell chip. Spell chips can't contain cantrips or rituals. The traits for this item vary based on the spell it contains.

In addition to the charge expended to Cast the Spell, the delicate components that make up the core lattice of a spell chip can be destroyed if used in quick succession. Attempting to use a spell chip more than once per day requires overclocking it. Cast the Spell again, then roll a @Check[flat|dc:10]. On a success, the spell chip is broken. On a failure, the spell chip is destroyed. If anyone tries to overclock a spell chip that's already been overclocked that day, the spell chip is automatically destroyed (even if it's been repaired) and no spell is cast.

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day, plus overclock

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated rank.

Haste Spell Amp.name: Haste Spell Amp
Haste Spell Amp.description:
Known on most worlds as "spell amps," spell ampoules are ready-to-use magic injections that confer the benefits of a spell of the specified rank.

Activate—Inject 1 (manipulate)

Effect 3rd-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.o6YCGx4lycsYpww4]{Haste} spell

Electromag Grenade (Elite).name: Electromag Grenade (Elite)
Electromag Grenade (Elite).description:
Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 2}

These grenades discharge a shocking field that deals 10d8 electricity damage in a @Template[burst|distance:15] with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save. If you have access to the critical specialization effect of grenades, tech creatures and unattended tech items that critically fail their saving throw against electromag grenades become glitching.

Ghost Killer.name: Ghost Killer
Ghost Killer.description: This upgrade lets you harm creatures without physical form. A ghost killer weapon is particularly effective against incorporeal creatures, which almost always have a specific vulnerability to ghost killer weapons. Incorporeal creatures can touch, hold, and wield ghost killer weapons (unlike most physical objects).

Container (Designer).name: Container (Designer)
Container (Designer).description:
Containers include backpacks, briefcases, duffel bags, and handbags. A container holds up to 4 Bulk and the first 2 Bulk of those items don't count against your Bulk limits. If you're carrying or stowing the container rather than wearing it on your person, its Bulk is light instead of negligible.

You gain a +1 item bonus to checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression} on high society individuals while carrying a designer container, such as a designer handbag.

Incendiary Grenade (Tactical).name: Incendiary Grenade (Tactical)
Incendiary Grenade (Tactical).description:
Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical 5 feet

These grenades use an ignited chemical to explode in a blast of intense heat and deal 2d8 fire damage with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save (@Template[burst|distance:10]). If you have access to the critical specialization effect of grenades, creatures who critically fail their saving throw against incendiary grenades are knocked away from the grenade.

Musical Instrument (Handheld, Tactical).name: Musical Instrument (Handheld, Tactical)
Musical Instrument (Handheld, Tactical).description:
All but the most traditional instruments use modern technology to amplify their sound, provide musical accompaniment, or connect wirelessly to other instruments. Handheld instruments include autohorns, guitars, psychoactive wave plates, digital synth decks, holoflutes, and more. The GM might rule that an especially large handheld instrument has greater Bulk. Some instruments have the tech trait.

A tactical instrument gives a +1 item bonus to Performance checks using that instrument.

Spell Chip (1st-Rank Spell).name: Spell Chip (1st-Rank Spell)
Spell Chip (1st-Rank Spell).description:
Usage installed in computer or comm unit;

These chips can be installed in comm units and other computers to allow the device to cast spells. Each device can have only one spell chip. Casting a spell from a spell chip requires holding the computer or comm unit in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell. The spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack modifier and spell DC. The spell must be of your spellcasting tradition. If the spell has a locus, you must still have that locus to cast the spell from a spell chip. Spell chips can't contain cantrips or rituals. The traits for this item vary based on the spell it contains.

In addition to the charge expended to Cast the Spell, the delicate components that make up the core lattice of a spell chip can be destroyed if used in quick succession. Attempting to use a spell chip more than once per day requires overclocking it. Cast the Spell again, then roll a @Check[flat|dc:10]. On a success, the spell chip is broken. On a failure, the spell chip is destroyed. If anyone tries to overclock a spell chip that's already been overclocked that day, the spell chip is automatically destroyed (even if it's been repaired) and no spell is cast.

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day, plus overclock

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated rank.

+3 Weapon Potency Crystal.name: +3 Weapon Potency Crystal
+3 Weapon Potency Crystal.description: This item crystallizes the focus needed to replicate the actions of a star. Attack rolls with the solar weapon or flare gain a +3 item bonus, and the weapon or flare can benefit from three orbital crystals.

Resist Energy Spell Amp (Commercial).name: Resist Energy Spell Amp (Commercial)
Resist Energy Spell Amp (Commercial).description:
Known on most worlds as "spell amps," spell ampoules are ready-to-use magic injections that confer the benefits of a spell of the specified rank.

Activate—Inject 1 (manipulate)

Effect 2nd-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Fr58LDSrbndgld9n]{Resist Energy} spell

Undermounted Grenade Launcher (Commercia.name: Undermounted Grenade Launcher (Commercial)
Undermounted Grenade Launcher (Commercia.description:
This bracket-mounted grenade launcher is most often advertised for use with fragmentation grenades, but can efficiently deploy utility ordinances, such as smoke grenades and flashbangs. Unlike a dedicated grenade launcher, it takes 10 minutes to load an undermounted grenade launcher, reassembling the grenade into ammunition by mounting it on a specialized reusable firing cap. Once a grenade has been loaded, it can only be safely removed by disassembling the entire grenade, destroying it in the process.

This grenade launcher has a range of 20 feet.

Activate—Launch 1 (attack)

Effect You launch the loaded grenade.

Dermal Plating (Paragon).name: Dermal Plating (Paragon)
Dermal Plating (Paragon).description: Hardened plates protect your skin and help you deflect physical blows. A limb with dermal plating functions as a shield. You can Raise a Shield with your limb, giving you a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of your next turn, but it doesn't require a hand to use. You can use the Shield Block reaction with your limb. Dermal plating has Hardness 35. After you use Shield Block, your dermal plating becomes damaged and can't be used for 24 hours as the nanites repair the durable plates.

Knife.name: Knife
Knife.description:
Upgrades: 1

Invaluable as both a weapon and a tool, knives come in a variety of shapes, styles, and materials ranging from starmetals to ceramics.

Coil Rifle.name: Coil Rifle
Coil Rifle.description:
Upgrades: 1

The barrel of this rifle is surrounded by a coil that accelerates ammunition with power and accuracy using carefully aligned magnetic fields.

Speed Suspension (Advanced).name: Speed Suspension (Advanced)
Speed Suspension (Advanced).description: High-performance cybernetics replace the joints and tendons in your legs. You gain a +15-foot item bonus to your land Speed.

Maneuvering Unit (Tactical).name: Maneuvering Unit (Tactical)
Maneuvering Unit (Tactical).description:
Internal stabilizers and jets synchronize your movements in zero gravity. You aren't @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} or clumsy while @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.z1ucw4CLwLqHoAp3]{Untethered}.

Activate—Thrust 1 (move)

Requirements You're in a zero-g environment

Effect You move 10 feet in any direction you choose. You begin to float in that direction.

Shredskin (Tactical).name: Shredskin (Tactical)
Shredskin (Tactical).description:
This slate-gray garment ripples with necromantic energy. When worn properly, this magical bodysuit transforms the appearance of a living creature into that of an undead creature and grants a +2 item bonus to Stealth checks.

Activate—Necrotize 2 (manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Duration 10 minutes (see text)

Effect The shredskin transforms your appearance into an undead version of yourself. Your disguise affects your visual appearance, sound, scent, and all other forms of detection, including lifesense. After the normal duration of this ability ends, you can extend it by 10 more minutes by piercing yourself with hooks on the robe, causing you to lose @Damage[25[healing]] Hit Points. The duration can't be extended a second time, and if these Hit Points are healed, the effect ends immediately.

Moodskin.name: Moodskin
Moodskin.description: Magically infused nanites injected into your skin automatically react to your mood by changing the pigmentation of your skin. The color change is gradual, typically taking at least 30 seconds to fully transition from one color to another. Moodskin can be customized to adjust which colors correspond to each mood during installation. This augmentation doesn't count toward your implant limit.

Marrow Paste (Tactical).name: Marrow Paste (Tactical)
Marrow Paste (Tactical).description: Developed and patented by Eoxian medical conglomerate Nulife, this magenta tincture's metallic odor is reminiscent of fresh blood. When applied to the body of a creature that can benefit from void healing, marrow paste grants fast healing 3 for 1 minute.

Nano-edge Rapier.name: Nano-edge Rapier
Nano-edge Rapier.description:
Upgrades: 1

The edge of this precision-crafted foil is sharpened to the thickness of a single atom, using regenerating nanites to maintain itself after countless strikes.

Hardlight Handwraps (Ultimate).name: Hardlight Handwraps (Ultimate)
Hardlight Handwraps (Ultimate).description:
Upgrades 3

These handwraps can be customized to shine in any color in the visible spectrum when used, and some manufacturers offer custom firmware that modifies their appearance to manifest as a claw, oversized fist, or hammerhead. They can even be worn in alternate ways on other parts of the body. These handwraps enhance your unarmed attacks as if they were manufactured weapons, allowing you to add an upgrade to your unarmed attacks. Treat the handwraps as melee weapons in the brawling group with light Bulk for these purposes.

Your unarmed attacks gain the tracking +3 trait and increase the damage to three dice.

Spell Gem (8th-Rank Spell).name: Spell Gem (8th-Rank Spell)
Spell Gem (8th-Rank Spell).description:
These latticed gemstones are suspended in a silicon casing and encoded with the magical script necessary to cast a single, specific spell. Casting a spell from a spell gem requires holding the gem in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell. The spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack modifier and spell DC. The spell must be of your spellcasting tradition. The spell in a spell gem can be cast only once, and the spell gem is destroyed as part of the casting. Spell gems can't contain cantrips or rituals. The traits for this item vary based on the spell it contains.

Activate Cast a Spell

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated rank.

Dragon Gland (Superior).name: Dragon Gland (Superior)
Dragon Gland (Superior).description:
With cutting edge surgery, you're implanted with an magical gland modified to function for a creature of your ancestry at the back of your throat. Choose your breath weapon's damage type when the organ is biocrafted from the following list: acid, cold, electricity, fire, or sonic. You gain the following activation.

Activate—Exhale 1 (manipulate)

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Effect Each creature in a @Template[type:cone|distance:15] takes @Damage[(6d6)[untyped]] damage with a @Check[reflex|dc:29|basic] save. The damage depends on the augmentation's version.

Explorer's Canteen.name: Explorer's Canteen
Explorer's Canteen.description:
This thermos has two compartments. The upper compartment contains nanomachines and filters that target common contaminants, making most food and water safe to consume and granting a +1 item bonus to saves against any poisons or diseases present in the food or water. The lower compartment converts inserted UPBs into edible nutri-paste at a rate of 2 UPBs per 1 day of nourishment.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.52tyG1y50LmTqCA9]{Effect: Explorer's Canteen}

Degradation Grenade (Commercial).name: Degradation Grenade (Commercial)
Degradation Grenade (Commercial).description:
Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @Damage[1[persistent,acid]] damage

Degradation grenades create violent blasts of magic that rip matter into different realities, leaving behind blackened hunks of matter that dissipate into nothingness. When the grenade explodes, it deals 1d8 acid damage in a @Template[burst|distance:5] with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save.

Plasma Cannon.name: Plasma Cannon
Plasma Cannon.description:
Upgrades: 1

This long-barreled weapon shoots charges of ionized gas that explode in a blast of superheated plasma.

Photon Crystal (Tactical).name: Photon Crystal (Tactical)
Photon Crystal (Tactical).description:
A photon crystal increases the flow of photon into your solar manifestations, burning and blinding your foes. While photon attuned, your solar weapon or solar flare deals an extra @Damage[1d6[fire]] damage. On a critical hit while you're photon attuned, the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:31] save or be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 2 rounds.

Damage dealt by your solar weapon or flare while photon attuned ignores the target's resistance to fire.

Dermal Plating (Tactical).name: Dermal Plating (Tactical)
Dermal Plating (Tactical).description: Hardened plates protect your skin and help you deflect physical blows. A limb with dermal plating functions as a shield. You can Raise a Shield with your limb, giving you a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of your next turn, but it doesn't require a hand to use. You can use the Shield Block reaction with your limb. Dermal plating has Hardness 10. After you use Shield Block, your dermal plating becomes damaged and can't be used for 24 hours as the nanites repair the durable plates.

Spell Chip (3rd-Rank Spell).name: Spell Chip (3rd-Rank Spell)
Spell Chip (3rd-Rank Spell).description:
Usage installed in computer or comm unit;

These chips can be installed in comm units and other computers to allow the device to cast spells. Each device can have only one spell chip. Casting a spell from a spell chip requires holding the computer or comm unit in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell. The spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack modifier and spell DC. The spell must be of your spellcasting tradition. If the spell has a locus, you must still have that locus to cast the spell from a spell chip. Spell chips can't contain cantrips or rituals. The traits for this item vary based on the spell it contains.

In addition to the charge expended to Cast the Spell, the delicate components that make up the core lattice of a spell chip can be destroyed if used in quick succession. Attempting to use a spell chip more than once per day requires overclocking it. Cast the Spell again, then roll a @Check[flat|dc:10]. On a success, the spell chip is broken. On a failure, the spell chip is destroyed. If anyone tries to overclock a spell chip that's already been overclocked that day, the spell chip is automatically destroyed (even if it's been repaired) and no spell is cast.

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day, plus overclock

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated rank.

Cosmic Connector.name: Cosmic Connector
Cosmic Connector.description:
This augmentation opens your mind to the underlying cosmic truths of the universe. When you get this augmentation, you either increase your Wisdom modifier by 1 or increase it to +4, whichever would give you a higher value.

Activate—Reground in Reality r (concentrate, fortune)

Frequency once per hour

Trigger You fail a saving throw against a magical effect

Effect You can reroll the save and use the better result.

Degradation Grenade (Superior).name: Degradation Grenade (Superior)
Degradation Grenade (Superior).description:
Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @Damage[1d6[persistent,acid]] damage

Degradation grenades create violent blasts of magic that rip matter into different realities, leaving behind blackened hunks of matter that dissipate into nothingness. When the grenade explodes, it deals 8d8 acid damage in a @Template[burst|distance:15] with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save.

Holy Module (Tactical).name: Holy Module (Tactical)
Holy Module (Tactical).description: This upgrade is often adorned with a religious symbol and channels celestial power. It deals an additional 1d4 spirit damage, or 3d4 spirit against an unholy target. If you are unholy, you are @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} while carrying or wielding this weapon. On a critical hit, the target is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} (or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} if unholy) until the end of your next turn unless it succeeds at a @Check[fortitude|dc:35] save.

Starfall Pistol.name: Starfall Pistol
Starfall Pistol.description:
Upgrades: 1

While originally a kit-bashed plasma caster, the commercial models fire streams of superheated plasma. Akitonian revelers enjoy discharging these pistols into the air during outdoor celebrations.

Container (Ordinary).name: Container (Ordinary)
Container (Ordinary).description: Containers include backpacks, briefcases, duffel bags, and handbags. A container holds up to 4 Bulk and the first 2 Bulk of those items don't count against your Bulk limits. If you're carrying or stowing the container rather than wearing it on your person, its Bulk is light instead of negligible.

Microgoggles.name: Microgoggles
Microgoggles.description: These bulky goggles include adjustable magnifying lenses and lights, granting you a +2 item bonus to any skill check that benefits from exceedingly close vision, such as detecting complicated forgeries, identifying pathogens in blood samples, or crafting drugs or medicinals.

Autograppler (Commercial).name: Autograppler (Commercial)
Autograppler (Commercial).description: You can attach this anchoring device to a cable line with an Interact action. Clamps automatically slide from the base of the autograppler along the attached cable, allowing it to be climbed like a knotted rope. You can throw the autograppler to attach it to a solid surface, attempting a ranged attack roll using your simple weapon proficiency against a DC depending on the target, typically at least DC 20. This attack has the secret trait. On a success, your autograppler has a firm hold, but on a critical failure, the grappler seems like it will hold but detaches when you're partway up.

Cloaking Skin (Commercial).name: Cloaking Skin (Commercial)
Cloaking Skin (Commercial).description:
Many of your pores are replaced with magically regulated and directed holographic projectors that synchronize when activated to automatically match your surroundings, rendering you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}.

Activate—Cloak 1 (concentrate)

Frequency once per day

Effect You gain the effects of 2nd-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility} for 1 minute or until you spend an action, which has the concentrate trait, to deactivate it.

Thermal Capacitor (Superior).name: Thermal Capacitor (Superior)
Thermal Capacitor (Superior).description: This armor upgrade regulates heat, protecting you from extreme temperatures. You're protected from incredible cold and mild heat.

Force Field (Elite).name: Force Field (Elite)
Force Field (Elite).description:
Force fields absorb damage. A force field's Hit Points are based on its version. While your force field is active, any physical or energy damage you would take is applied to the force field's Hit Points first before being applied to your Hit Points (including temporary Hit Points). If you have a shield raised, your force field and shield both take damage. If damage from an attack or effect reduces the force field to 0 Hit Points, you take any excess damage, the force field deactivates, and it can't be activated again for 10 minutes. Force fields replenish the indicated number of Hit Points each round at the beginning of your turn while they're active.

If your force field is tactical or better, it also protects you from deadly blows. Each time you're critically hit while your force field is active, attempt a flat check against the listed DC. On a success, it becomes a normal hit.

The force field has 32 Hit Points and replenishes 6 Hit Points on your turn, and @Check[flat|dc:17].

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.7CtHz1DQcMXLafOS]{Effect: Force Field 32}

Activate—Raise Force Field 1 (manipulate)

Frequency three times per day

Effect Your force field becomes active. It remains active for 1 minute or until it's reduced to 0 Hit Points.

Marrow Paste (Commercial).name: Marrow Paste (Commercial)
Marrow Paste (Commercial).description: Developed and patented by Eoxian medical conglomerate Nulife, this magenta tincture's metallic odor is reminiscent of fresh blood. When applied to the body of a creature that can benefit from void healing, marrow paste grants fast healing 1 for 1 minute.

Holoskin (Tactical).name: Holoskin (Tactical)
Holoskin (Tactical).description: A holographic projector mounted to a belt or limb strap can be activated as an Interact action. It can be programmed to project the appearance of another creature of the same size category as yourself, hiding your true appearance. A holoskin doesn't change your voice, scent, or mannerisms. The appearance of held and worn items aren't affected. You usually need a holoskin to set up a disguise in order to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate} someone using the Deception skill. A tactical holoskin adds a +1 item bonus to relevant checks.

Defiance Series.name: Defiance Series
Defiance Series.description:
Upgrades: 1

This squad armor is a molded shell of reinforced polycarbon with a helmet and retractable visor.

Commando Serum.name: Commando Serum
Commando Serum.description:
Activate 1 (manipulate)

This tangy crimson elixir grants you 1d10+5 temporary Hit Points, as well as a +5-foot item bonus to any Speed you have for 1 minute. When you drink this serum, your veins protrude, and your eyes take on a reddish tinge.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.uf3Fb7Fm7dSzc7Os]{Effect: Commando Serum}

Slough-Do (Commercial).name: Slough-Do (Commercial)
Slough-Do (Commercial).description:
This wad of green slime looks like a mass of jelly, but when worn on the head, you can Interact to style it into hair-do-like fashions. While worn, rivulets of green liquid slowly dribble into your ears and down your forehead and neck, making it uncomfortable to use long-term.

Slough-do grants you a +1 item bonus to Occultism checks, and allows you to cast the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.h7IhypLwItepwhou]{Adhere} cantrip as an occult innate spell.

Deflecting Field.name: Deflecting Field
Deflecting Field.description: This shield isn't held—instead, it's installed as an armor or weapon upgrade. A deflecting field appears as a translucent panel integrated into the upgraded item and creates a temporary protective hardlight barrier when activated.

Incendiary Grenade (Paragon).name: Incendiary Grenade (Paragon)
Incendiary Grenade (Paragon).description:
Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical 10 feet

These grenades use an ignited chemical to explode in a blast of intense heat and deal 14d8 fire damage with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save (@Template[burst|distance:20]). If you have access to the critical specialization effect of grenades, creatures who critically fail their saving throw against incendiary grenades are knocked away from the grenade.

Sniper's Scope (Advanced).name: Sniper's Scope (Advanced)
Sniper's Scope (Advanced).description:
A telescopic sighting attachment helps view distant targets.

The scope grants you a +2 item bonus to visual Perception checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} creatures through the scope.

Activate—Adjust Sight 1 (manipulate)

Effect Increase the range increment of the weapon the scope is attached to by 20 feet. If the weapon has a base range increment of 50 feet or more, increase the range of the weapon by 40 feet instead. This lasts until the beginning of your next turn or until you're no longer wielding the weapon this scope is attached to, whichever comes first. This does not increase the size of area attacks.

Hypernerves.name: Hypernerves
Hypernerves.description:
This augmentation enhances your muscles and nervous system to dramatically improve your flexibility and reaction time. You gain a +3 item bonus to Acrobatics checks. When you get this augmentation, you either increase your Dexterity modifier by 1 or increase it to +4, whichever would give you a higher value.

Activate—Engage Hypernerves f (concentrate)

Frequency once per day

Trigger One of your reactions triggers, but you have no remaining reactions to spend

Effect You gain a reaction and immediately use the triggering reaction. You're @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} on your following turn.

Force Field (Commercial).name: Force Field (Commercial)
Force Field (Commercial).description:
Force fields absorb damage. A force field's Hit Points are based on its version. While your force field is active, any physical or energy damage you would take is applied to the force field's Hit Points first before being applied to your Hit Points (including temporary Hit Points). If you have a shield raised, your force field and shield both take damage. If damage from an attack or effect reduces the force field to 0 Hit Points, you take any excess damage, the force field deactivates, and it can't be activated again for 10 minutes. Force fields replenish the indicated number of Hit Points each round at the beginning of your turn while they're active.

If your force field is tactical or better, it also protects you from deadly blows. Each time you're critically hit while your force field is active, attempt a flat check against the listed DC. On a success, it becomes a normal hit.

The force field has 6 Hit Points and replenishes 2 Hit Points on your turn.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.7CtHz1DQcMXLafOS]{Effect: Force Field 6}

Activate—Raise Force Field 1 (manipulate)

Frequency three times per day

Effect Your force field becomes active. It remains active for 1 minute or until it's reduced to 0 Hit Points.

Crystallized Shockshard (Advanced).name: Crystallized Shockshard (Advanced)
Crystallized Shockshard (Advanced).description:
Activate f (concentrate)

Trigger You deal damage to a creature with the weapon.

This electric-blue crystal crackles with energy. When you activate the shockshard, the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:20] save or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} for 1 minute. If the target has the tech trait, it instead becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 2}.

Quasar Crystal.name: Quasar Crystal
Quasar Crystal.description: Quasar crystals condense your solar energy into a single point ready to release on impact. Attacks with this weapon are a critical hit on a 19 on the die as long as that result is a success. This property has no effect on a 19 if the result would be a failure.

Pain Journal (Tactical).name: Pain Journal (Tactical)
Pain Journal (Tactical).description:
Your raw emotions empower the poems and phrases penned in this synthetic leather journal. After spending 1 day writing in your pain journal, select Diplomacy, Intimidation, or Performance. Once a skill is selected for a pain journal, it can't be changed. Reading directly from the journal harnesses your painful memories, projects your emotions, and gives you a +2 item bonus to checks using the selected skill.

Activate—Painful Memory 2 (manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Effect You recite a poem of utter anguish to spread your misery to another creature, casting a 7th-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.EhN3GjdjXChMdiFk]{Share Pain} (DC 34).

Swarmsuit.name: 集群服装 Swarmsuit
Swarmsuit.description:
Upgrades: 1

Specialized nanites form a mesh suit that shifts to fit wearers with unique or transformable physiologies.

Dueling Sword.name: Dueling Sword
Dueling Sword.description:
Upgrades: 1

Coming in a variety of styles, these traditional and time-tested weapons have been honed with advanced smithing techniques and modern materials.

Repair Toolkit (Tactical).name: Repair Toolkit (Tactical)
Repair Toolkit (Tactical).description: A repair toolkit contains a variety of delicate tools and supplies that allows you to perform simple repairs while traveling. You can use a repair toolkit to Repair items using the Crafting skill. A tactical repair toolkit gives you a +1 item bonus to the check. You can draw and replace a worn repair toolkit as part of the action that uses it.

Resist Energy Spell Amp (Advanced).name: Resist Energy Spell Amp (Advanced)
Resist Energy Spell Amp (Advanced).description:
Known on most worlds as "spell amps," spell ampoules are ready-to-use magic injections that confer the benefits of a spell of the specified rank.

Activate—Inject 1 (manipulate)

Effect 7th-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Fr58LDSrbndgld9n]{Resist Energy} spell

Carbon Skin.name: Carbon Skin
Carbon Skin.description:
Upgrades: 1

This form-fitting suit of carbon fiber encases the body. Most are usually dull-gray, functional garments, while pricier, bespoke suits dazzle like diamonds.

Electromag Grenade (Paragon).name: Electromag Grenade (Paragon)
Electromag Grenade (Paragon).description:
Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 1}

These grenades discharge a shocking field that deals 14d8 electricity damage in a @Template[burst|distance:20] with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save. If you have access to the critical specialization effect of grenades, tech creatures and unattended tech items that critically fail their saving throw against electromag grenades become glitching.

Psychoactive Eyes (Commercial).name: Psychoactive Eyes (Commercial)
Psychoactive Eyes (Commercial).description:
Your irises are injected with psychoactive dyes that cause a signature kaleidoscopic effect, or your eyes have been completely replaced with delicate magitech devices. You can activate these dyes to enthrall those you look upon with varying effects depending on the item's type.

Activate—Gaze 2 (concentrate, mental, visual)

Frequency once per day

Effect You focus your eyes on a creature that can see you within 30 feet. The creature attempts a @Check[will|dc:17] saving throw with the following results.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The creature is fascinated for as long as it can see you. Taking a hostile action against the creature ends the effect.

Filtered Rebreather (Advanced).name: Filtered Rebreather (Advanced)
Filtered Rebreather (Advanced).description:
This armor upgrade supplements your armor's environmental protections and filters out common contaminants, including protection from most toxic atmospheres.

You gain a +2 status bonus to Fortitude saves against inhaled effects.

Infiltrator's Toolkit (Tactical).name: Infiltrator's Toolkit (Tactical)
Infiltrator's Toolkit (Tactical).description: You need an infiltrator's toolkit to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{Pick Locks} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{Disable Devices} (of some types) using the Thievery skill. A tactical infiltrator's toolkit adds a +1 item bonus to checks to Pick Locks or Disable Devices.

Grindblade.name: Grindblade
Grindblade.description:
Upgrades: 1

The edge of this broad-tipped sword is composed of micro-splitting nanoparticles that slice apart targets with surgical precision.

Maratan Headache (Tactical).name: Maratan Headache (Tactical)
Maratan Headache (Tactical).description:
Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{sickened 1}

Maratan headaches are made from brittle hollow gourds filled with a putrid sludge, dealing 2d8 nonlethal poison damage in a @Template[burst|distance:10] with a @Check[fortitude|against:class|basic] save.

Hardlight Handwraps (Commercial).name: Hardlight Handwraps (Commercial)
Hardlight Handwraps (Commercial).description:
Upgrades 1

These handwraps can be customized to shine in any color in the visible spectrum when used, and some manufacturers offer custom firmware that modifies their appearance to manifest as a claw, oversized fist, or hammerhead. They can even be worn in alternate ways on other parts of the body. These handwraps enhance your unarmed attacks as if they were manufactured weapons, allowing you to add an upgrade to your unarmed attacks. Treat the handwraps as melee weapons in the brawling group with light Bulk for these purposes.

Magnetar Rifle.name: Magnetar Rifle
Magnetar Rifle.description:
Upgrades: 1

This rifle uses powerful electromagnets to accelerate simple slugs into deadly, highly accurate projectiles without the use of any moving parts.

Datajack (Advanced).name: Datajack (Advanced)
Datajack (Advanced).description:
This cybernetic is a programmable data port installed into your body, allowing you to access computers and digital storage devices. Any handheld computer can connect to the port, while larger systems typically require an adapter cable. You don't need an interface to access the system, as it connects directly to your nervous system via the datajack. You must still attempt any skill checks associated with operating the device, such as Computers to access a system. Some closed systems don't allow direct data access at all.

You gain a +2 item bonus to Computers checks when accessing a system with an advanced datajack.

Invisibility Potion.name: 隐形药水 Invisibility Potion
Invisibility Potion.description:
启动 A （操作）

隐形药水是一种无色而且异常轻盈的药水。喝下它之后，你获得2环级@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{隐形术 Invisibility}的效果。

Chemalyzer.name: Chemalyzer
Chemalyzer.description: This handheld sampling unit grants a +1 circumstance bonus to skill checks to identify an unknown drug, medicinal, poison, or other chemical substance.

Tempweave.name: Tempweave
Tempweave.description:
Upgrades: 1

Tempweave suits are reinforced hooded garments woven with thermal fabric and venting wires, popularly worn for trips to humid climates like the jungles of Castrovel or Pulonis.

Spell Chip (8th-Rank Spell).name: Spell Chip (8th-Rank Spell)
Spell Chip (8th-Rank Spell).description:
Usage installed in computer or comm unit;

These chips can be installed in comm units and other computers to allow the device to cast spells. Each device can have only one spell chip. Casting a spell from a spell chip requires holding the computer or comm unit in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell. The spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack modifier and spell DC. The spell must be of your spellcasting tradition. If the spell has a locus, you must still have that locus to cast the spell from a spell chip. Spell chips can't contain cantrips or rituals. The traits for this item vary based on the spell it contains.

In addition to the charge expended to Cast the Spell, the delicate components that make up the core lattice of a spell chip can be destroyed if used in quick succession. Attempting to use a spell chip more than once per day requires overclocking it. Cast the Spell again, then roll a @Check[flat|dc:10]. On a success, the spell chip is broken. On a failure, the spell chip is destroyed. If anyone tries to overclock a spell chip that's already been overclocked that day, the spell chip is automatically destroyed (even if it's been repaired) and no spell is cast.

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day, plus overclock

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated rank.

Flashlight (Commercial).name: Flashlight (Commercial)
Flashlight (Commercial).description: A flashlight sheds bright light. A commercial flashlight emits light in a 30-foot emanation (and dim light in the next 30 feet).

Hypopen (Commercial).name: Hypopen (Commercial)
Hypopen (Commercial).description:
This tiny cylinder contains specialized nanites that either
